collectiondata.overview:
Best Singapore Tour Packages From Kolkata

​

Step into the dazzling city state of Singapore, where futuristic skylines, lush green spaces, and world class attractions come together effortlessly. Travelxploria brings you the Best Singapore Tour Packages From Kolkata, designed for families, honeymoon couples, and leisure travelers seeking a smooth, safe, and value driven international holiday. From iconic landmarks to immersive cultural neighborhoods, our Singapore tour packages from Kolkata are curated for comfort, convenience, and unforgettable experiences.

Why Choose Singapore Tour Packages From Kolkata

Singapore is one of the most convenient international destinations for travelers from Kolkata. With excellent flight connectivity via major hubs, reaching Singapore is quick and hassle free. Indian passport holders require a visa, and Travelxploria provides complete visa assistance with clear timelines, making the planning process simple and transparent. This ease of travel makes Singapore tour packages from Kolkata ideal even for first time international travelers.

Singapore is known for its clean cities, efficient transport, and diverse attractions. From luxury shopping and theme parks to cultural districts and waterfront views, a Singapore tour package from Kolkata offers a perfect mix of entertainment, sightseeing, and relaxation.

Ideal for Families, Couples, and Solo Travelers

Singapore caters to every travel style. Families love theme parks, interactive attractions, and safe public spaces. Couples enjoy romantic skyline views, rooftop dining, and scenic walks, while solo travelers appreciate the city’s safety and ease of navigation. Travelxploria customizes Singapore tour packages from Kolkata for families, couples, and individual travelers with flexible itineraries and reliable support.

Top Singapore Tour Packages From Kolkata

The most popular option is the 4 to 6 days Singapore tour package from Kolkata, covering the city’s top highlights without rushing. This itinerary typically includes Marina Bay Sands, Sentosa Island, and Gardens by the Bay. Travelers enjoy a perfect balance of city sightseeing, leisure time, and entertainment.

For couples, Singapore honeymoon packages from Kolkata focus on romantic experiences such as skyline dinners, sunset cruises, and luxury hotel stays. Budget friendly Singapore tour packages from Kolkata are ideal for value conscious travelers, offering comfortable hotels and guided sightseeing at competitive prices. Families and groups can choose customized Singapore itineraries with kid friendly attractions and relaxed schedules.

Must Visit Attractions Included in Singapore Tour Packages From Kolkata

Marina Bay offers breathtaking city views, the SkyPark observation deck, and vibrant nightlife. Sentosa Island is a favorite among families and adventure lovers, featuring beaches, resorts, and Universal Studios Singapore. Gardens by the Bay impresses visitors with its Supertree Grove and climate controlled domes. Cultural districts like Chinatown and Little India showcase Singapore’s heritage, while Orchard Road is perfect for shopping enthusiasts.

What Is Included in the Best Singapore Tour Packages From Kolkata

Most Singapore tour packages from Kolkata include return flights, airport transfers, hotel accommodation with daily breakfast, guided sightseeing tours, visa assistance, and travel insurance. Select packages also include Sentosa attractions, Universal Studios tickets, and optional experiences like river cruises.

Best Time to Visit Singapore From Kolkata

February to April is ideal for pleasant weather and outdoor sightseeing. June to August is popular for family travel due to school holidays and seasonal events. Travelers looking for better deals can consider off peak months, which often offer attractive pricing on Singapore tour packages from Kolkata along with fewer crowds.

How to Book the Best Singapore Tour Packages From Kolkata

Travelxploria offers transparent pricing, expert travel advice, and dependable customer support for booking Singapore holidays from Kolkata. Booking early, choosing flexible travel dates, and watching seasonal offers help secure the best value. Ensure your passport is valid for at least six months and keep all travel documents ready.

Choosing the Best Singapore Tour Packages From Kolkata means choosing a journey filled with comfort, safety, and iconic experiences. With Travelxploria, your Singapore trip is thoughtfully planned to deliver memories that last long after you return.

packages.package_name: From Merlion to Petronas: Singapore & Malaysia Tour
packages.overview:
• Arrive in Singapore – Night Safari
    Explore the world’s first Night Safari, witnessing exotic nocturnal wildlife.
  • Sentosa Island & City Landmarks
    Visit Sentosa Island, Thian Hock Keng Temple, Merlion, and Singapore Botanic Gardens.
  • Universal Studios Adventure
    Enjoy thrilling rides and immersive experiences at Universal Studios Singapore.
  • Transfer to Genting Highlands
    Travel to Genting Highlands, a mountain resort filled with entertainment.
  • Genting SkyWorlds & Kuala Lumpur
    Have fun at Genting SkyWorlds Theme Park, then head to Kuala Lumpur.
  • Kuala Lumpur Sightseeing
    Explore King’s Palace, Petronas Twin Towers, and the National Monument.
  • Departure
    Fly back home with cherished memories of Singapore & Malaysia.

After your thrilling night of exploration, we ensure a comfortable drop-off back to your hotel.​

Embark on a seamless exploration of Singapore’s most iconic landmarks with Travelxploria’s best-in-class service. Our experienced tour guide and on-ground support staff ensure a hassle-free journey, starting with Sentosa Island, where pristine beaches, luxury resorts, and thrilling attractions await. Next, visit the historic Thian Hock Keng Temple, a masterpiece of Chinese architecture, where our guide shares intriguing tales of Singapore’s rich heritage. Continue to the Merlion, Singapore’s national symbol, offering breathtaking waterfront views, perfect for capturing unforgettable moments. Conclude the day with a peaceful stroll through the UNESCO-listed Singapore Botanic Gardens, home to lush greenery and vibrant orchid displays. With Travelxploria’s seamless pick-up and drop-off service, your experience remains effortless, leaving you free to immerse yourself in the beauty and culture of Singapore.

National Monument","day_summary":"

Embark on an unforgettable Half Day City Tour of Kuala Lumpur with Travelxploria’s expert representatives ensuring a seamless experience from start to finish. Our experienced tour guide will take you on a journey through the city’s rich cultural heritage and modern marvels, making every stop insightful and engaging. Capture stunning photos at the Petronas Twin Towers, King's Palace, National Monument, and the National Mosque, while learning fascinating stories behind these landmarks. Visit the Cocoa Centre, where you can explore Malaysia’s renowned chocolate industry and sample delicious treats. Our tour also takes you to the historic Independence Square, a symbol of Malaysia’s journey to freedom, where you can immerse yourself in the city's vibrant energy. With Travelxploria’s best on-ground support staff, seamless pick-up and drop-off services, and a carefully curated itinerary, this tour guarantees a hassle-free and enriching experience in Malaysia’s dynamic capital.

Get ready for an awe-inspiring visit to the Petronas Twin Towers with Travelxploria! After a convenient hotel pick-up in a comfortable vehicle, our friendly representative and expert guide will accompany you to Kuala Lumpur’s most iconic landmark. Marvel at the breathtaking skyline from the observation deck on the 86th floor and walk the famous Skybridge, which connects the twin towers. Learn fascinating insights about the tower’s architecture and history as you soak in panoramic city views. Capture stunning photos before we ensure a smooth drop-off back at your hotel, making your experience seamless and unforgettable!​

Step into the grandeur of Istana Negara, the King’s Palace of Malaysia, with Travelxploria! Your journey begins with a comfortable hotel pick-up by our friendly representative, ensuring a smooth ride to this magnificent landmark. Accompanied by our expert guide, marvel at the stunning golden domes and majestic architecture of the official residence of the Malaysian King. Witness the Royal Guard ceremony, capturing iconic photos against the grand palace gates. Our guide will share fascinating insights into Malaysia’s monarchy, culture, and traditions, making your visit an enriching experience. Stroll through the beautifully maintained palace grounds and absorb the regal ambiance. After admiring this symbol of Malaysia’s royal heritage, take a moment to relax as we drop you back at your hotel, ensuring a seamless and luxurious experience with Travelxploria. A visit to the King’s Palace is truly a royal affair not to be missed!

Begin your spiritual and cultural journey as Travelxploria’s representative picks you up from your hotel in a comfortable, air-conditioned vehicle. Upon arrival at the National Mosque of Malaysia (Masjid Negara), our expert guide will provide fascinating insights into its stunning architecture, rich Islamic heritage, and deep cultural significance. Admire the mosque’s grand 73-meter-high minaret, striking blue-tiled dome, and beautifully landscaped gardens. Step inside the vast prayer hall, where intricate Islamic calligraphy and elegant design create a serene ambiance. Learn about Malaysia’s diverse Islamic influences and the mosque’s role in the nation’s spiritual life. Stroll through the reflecting pools and fountains, capturing breathtaking photos of this iconic landmark. Whether seeking cultural enrichment or peaceful reflection, this visit promises an unforgettable experience. After exploring, relax as we drop you back at your hotel, ensuring a smooth and enriching journey with Travelxploria.​

Begin your spiritual and cultural journey as Travelxploria’s representative picks you up from your hotel in a comfortable, air-conditioned vehicle. Upon arrival at the National Mosque of Malaysia (Masjid Negara), our expert guide will provide fascinating insights into its stunning architecture, rich Islamic heritage, and deep cultural significance. Admire the mosque’s grand 73-meter-high minaret, striking blue-tiled dome, and beautifully landscaped gardens. Step inside the vast prayer hall, where intricate Islamic calligraphy and elegant design create a serene ambiance. Learn about Malaysia’s diverse Islamic influences and the mosque’s role in the nation’s spiritual life. Stroll through the reflecting pools and fountains, capturing breathtaking photos of this iconic landmark. Whether seeking cultural enrichment or peaceful reflection, this visit promises an unforgettable experience. After exploring, relax as we drop you back at your hotel, ensuring a smooth and enriching journey with Travelxploria.​

With our experienced tour guide offering a final glimpse into Malaysia’s rich heritage and our best on-ground support staff handling all logistics, your journey to Kuala Lumpur Airport is effortless.

As you board your flight back to Singapore or your next destination, take a moment to reflect on the incredible experiences—from vibrant cityscapes to thrilling adventures and cultural wonders. With memories of iconic landmarks, luxurious experiences, and seamless travel arrangements, your journey with Travelxploria has been nothing short of exceptional. Safe travels, and we look forward to crafting your next unforgettable adventure.

packages.overview:
• Arrival & City Views – Arrive in Kuala Lumpur, visit KL Tower Observatory for panoramic views, and explore the Chocolate Boutique.
  • KL Highlights & Genting Excursion – Guided city tour, visit Batu Caves, and enjoy thrilling rides at Skyworld Theme Park in Genting Highlands.
  • Putrajaya & Malacca Exploration – Orientation tour of Putrajaya, drive to Malacca, enjoy a scenic river cruise, and visit the Maritime Museum.
  • Journey to Singapore & Gardens by the Bay – Drive to Singapore, explore the city with a guided tour, and visit the stunning Gardens by the Bay.
  • Bird Park & Sentosa Island Adventure – Visit Mandai Bird Park, enjoy breathtaking views from MBS Sky Park, and take a cable car ride to Sentosa Island.
  • Universal Studios & S.E.A. Aquarium – Experience thrilling rides at Universal Studios and explore marine wonders at S.E.A. Aquarium.
  • Board the Genting Dream Cruise – Check out from the hotel and embark on the luxurious Genting Dream Cruise for an exciting sea journey.
  • Cruise Leisure & Entertainment – Enjoy world-class amenities, pools, gourmet dining, and entertainment on board.
  • Cruise Exploration & Relaxation – Continue indulging in the cruise’s activities, fine dining, and vibrant entertainment.
  • Departure – Disembark from the cruise and head to the airport, bidding farewell to an unforgettable journey.

Embark on an unforgettable Half Day City Tour of Kuala Lumpur with Travelxploria’s expert representatives ensuring a seamless experience from start to finish. Our experienced tour guide will take you on a journey through the city’s rich cultural heritage and modern marvels, making every stop insightful and engaging. Capture stunning photos at the Petronas Twin Towers, King's Palace, National Monument, and the National Mosque, while learning fascinating stories behind these landmarks. Visit the Cocoa Centre, where you can explore Malaysia’s renowned chocolate industry and sample delicious treats. Our tour also takes you to the historic Independence Square, a symbol of Malaysia’s journey to freedom, where you can immerse yourself in the city's vibrant energy. With Travelxploria’s best on-ground support staff, seamless pick-up and drop-off services, and a carefully curated itinerary, this tour guarantees a hassle-free and enriching experience in Malaysia’s dynamic capital.

Start your day with an enriching orientation tour of Putrajaya, where our Travelxploria representative and experienced tour guide will introduce you to Malaysia’s administrative capital, famed for its grand architecture, serene lakes, and stunning bridges. Marvel at landmarks like the Putra Mosque and Perdana Putra before setting off on a scenic drive to Malacca, a city steeped in colonial history. Upon arrival, embark on a Malacca River Cruise, gliding past colorful heritage buildings, historic churches, and vibrant street art that tell tales of a bygone era. The journey continues with a visit to the Maritime Museum, where you’ll explore a life-sized replica of a Portuguese ship and learn about Malacca’s rich maritime history. With Travelxploria’s best on-ground support staff ensuring a seamless experience, sit back, relax, and soak in the cultural wonders of the day before heading to your next adventure.

After soaking in the sights, head to Chinatown, where you'll experience the vibrant cultural heart of Singapore, with opportunities to shop for souvenirs and visit the serene Buddha Tooth Relic Temple. Along the way, enjoy a delicious breakfast, carefully selected to energize you for the day ahead. Your Travelxploria guide will ensure you make the most of each stop, sharing insights into Singapore's rich history and traditions. The experience includes hotel pick-up and drop-off, providing a seamless, hassle-free journey throughout your tour.


Begin your day with a delicious breakfast, followed by a comfortable pick-up from your hotel with our Travelxploria guide. Explore the iconic Gardens by the Bay, a futuristic oasis blending nature and technology. Wander through the breathtaking Supertree Grove, marveling at the towering vertical gardens. Step into the climate-controlled wonders of the Flower Dome, showcasing global flora, and the mystical Cloud Forest, with its spectacular indoor waterfall. After an unforgettable experience, we’ll ensure a smooth drop-off back to your hotel.

Join Travelxploria for an enchanting journey to Bird Paradise Singapore, where nature comes alive! Our courteous representative will pick you up from your hotel in a comfortable, air-conditioned vehicle. Led by our expert guide, explore this breathtaking aviary teeming with thousands of exotic birds. Witness the vibrant macaws, graceful flamingos, and mighty eagles in beautifully crafted habitats. Engage in interactive feeding sessions and be amazed by spectacular bird shows. After a day filled with nature’s melodies and stunning sights, sit back and unwind as we drop you safely back at your hotel, ensuring a smooth and memorable experience.

A visit to Marina Bay is incomplete without experiencing the SkyPark Observation Deck, offering stunning views 57 stories above Singapore. Begin your day with a delightful breakfast before our expert Travelxploria guide picks you up from your hotel. At the SkyPark, indulge in a luxurious wine-and-dine experience, enjoy the breathtaking skyline, and shop for exclusive souvenirs while gazing at the world’s largest infinity pool. With our convenient hotel pickup and drop-off, you can relax and soak in the unforgettable sights of Singapore’s iconic Marina Bay.

On your visit to Sentosa Island, join Travelxploria for a thrilling ride on the iconic cable car that connects Faber Peak to the island. Enjoy a 30-minute journey offering 360-degree views of Singapore’s lush forests, impressive skyscrapers, and serene sandy beaches as you travel nearly 5 kilometers. Travelxploria’s representative will be with you throughout the experience, ensuring your comfort and providing fascinating insights along the way. The trip includes convenient pick-up from your hotel, so you can relax and enjoy the seamless start to your adventure. Once you’ve taken in the stunning sights from the cable car, you’ll be dropped off back at your hotel, completing the perfect, hassle-free experience. This journey offers the ideal mix of nature and cityscape, all guided by a Travelxploria expert.

Universal Studios Singapore is a world-class theme park located on Sentosa Island, offering a thrilling experience with seven uniquely themed zones, including Hollywood, Sci-Fi City, Jurassic Park, and Far Far Away. Visitors can enjoy exciting rides like Transformers: The Ride and Battlestar Galactica, immersive 4D shows, live entertainment, and meet iconic movie characters. Perfect for all ages, it’s a must-visit destination for adventure, fun, and family-friendly attractions. Enjoy the convenience of hotel pickup and drop-off, along with a knowledgeable Travelxploria guide to ensure a smooth and memorable experience throughout your visit.​

After a delightful breakfast, a friendly Travelxploria representative will pick you up from your hotel. Embark on an unforgettable journey to the S.E.A. Aquarium on Sentosa, one of the world’s largest aquariums, housing over 100,000 marine animals across 45 habitats. Explore the mesmerizing marine life and, during the holiday season, enjoy the festive Splashtacular Christmas with thrilling waterslides and a relaxing lazy river experience. After a day of adventure, enjoy a comfortable drop-off back to your hotel.

MBS Sky Park (Non-Peak Timings) - Visit Sentosa Island by one way cable car","day_summary":"

Join Travelxploria for an enchanting journey to Bird Paradise Singapore, where nature comes alive! Our courteous representative will pick you up from your hotel in a comfortable, air-conditioned vehicle. Led by our expert guide, explore this breathtaking aviary teeming with thousands of exotic birds. Witness the vibrant macaws, graceful flamingos, and mighty eagles in beautifully crafted habitats. Engage in interactive feeding sessions and be amazed by spectacular bird shows. After a day filled with nature’s melodies and stunning sights, sit back and unwind as we drop you safely back at your hotel, ensuring a smooth and memorable experience.

A visit to Marina Bay is incomplete without experiencing the SkyPark Observation Deck, offering stunning views 57 stories above Singapore. Begin your day with a delightful breakfast before our expert Travelxploria guide picks you up from your hotel. At the SkyPark, indulge in a luxurious wine-and-dine experience, enjoy the breathtaking skyline, and shop for exclusive souvenirs while gazing at the world’s largest infinity pool. With our convenient hotel pickup and drop-off, you can relax and soak in the unforgettable sights of Singapore’s iconic Marina Bay.

On your visit to Sentosa Island, join Travelxploria for a thrilling ride on the iconic cable car that connects Faber Peak to the island. Enjoy a 30-minute journey offering 360-degree views of Singapore’s lush forests, impressive skyscrapers, and serene sandy beaches as you travel nearly 5 kilometers. Travelxploria’s representative will be with you throughout the experience, ensuring your comfort and providing fascinating insights along the way. The trip includes convenient pick-up from your hotel, so you can relax and enjoy the seamless start to your adventure. Once you’ve taken in the stunning sights from the cable car, you’ll be dropped off back at your hotel, completing the perfect, hassle-free experience. This journey offers the ideal mix of nature and cityscape, all guided by a Travelxploria expert.

packages.overview:
• Kuala Lumpur Arrival & City Exploration – Arrive in Kuala Lumpur, explore Putrajaya, enjoy a guided city tour, and visit a Chocolate Boutique.
  • Batu Caves & Genting Highlands Adventure – Visit the iconic Batu Caves, enjoy a scenic drive to Genting Highlands, and experience the thrills of Skyworld Theme Park.
  • Leisure Day or Sunway Lagoon (Optional) – Relax at your own pace or opt for a fun-filled day at Sunway Lagoon with water rides and adventure zones.
  • Kuala Lumpur to Singapore & City Tour – Travel to Singapore, explore landmarks like the Merlion, Marina Bay Sands, and visit the mesmerizing Gardens by the Bay.
  • Mandai Bird Park & Sentosa Island – Discover exotic birds at Mandai Bird Park, enjoy views from MBS Sky Park, and take a scenic cable car ride to Sentosa.
  • Leisure Day or Universal Studios & S.E.A. Aquarium (Optional) – Free day to explore or enjoy thrilling rides at Universal Studios and marine wonders at S.E.A. Aquarium.
  • Departure – Bid farewell to Singapore and head to Changi Airport with unforgettable memories. Safe travels.

Your journey begins with an orientation tour of Putrajaya, Malaysia’s administrative capital, where stunning architecture, serene lakes, and iconic landmarks like the Putra Mosque and Perdana Putra set the stage for a memorable experience. With our experienced Travelxploria tour guide, explore Kuala Lumpur’s vibrant cityscape, from the colonial charm of Merdeka Square to the majestic Sultan Abdul Samad Building. Indulge in a delightful stop at the Chocolate Boutique, where you can savor and shop for Malaysia’s finest handmade chocolates. Throughout the day, our best on-ground support staff ensures a hassle-free experience with smooth pick-ups, drop-offs, and expert insights into the city’s rich history and culture. Get ready to be enchanted by Kuala Lumpur’s unique fusion of tradition and modernity.

Embark on a fascinating journey to the Batu Caves with Travelxploria! Our friendly representative will pick you up from your hotel in a comfortable vehicle, ensuring a smooth start to your adventure. Accompanied by an expert guide, explore this iconic Hindu pilgrimage site, home to the majestic 272 rainbow-colored steps leading to limestone caves filled with ancient temples and shrines. Marvel at the towering golden statue of Lord Murugan, witness intricate cave formations, and experience the spiritual aura of the site. After capturing unforgettable moments, relax as we drop you back at your hotel, ensuring a seamless and enriching experience!

Get ready for an exhilarating journey to Genting Highlands, where Travelxploria’s representative ensures a seamless pick-up from your hotel. As you ascend the cool, misty mountains, our experienced tour guide shares fascinating insights into this vibrant hill resort. Feel the thrill as you board the one-way cable car, gliding over lush rainforests with breathtaking panoramic views. Once at the top, immerse yourself in the excitement of the casinos, theme parks, and world-class shopping experiences. Whether you seek adventure or relaxation, Travelxploria’s best on-ground support staff is always ready to assist, ensuring a hassle-free experience. On your way back, make a brief stop at the sacred Batu Caves, where you can climb the 272 steps to witness the awe-inspiring golden statue of Lord Murugan. With seamless transfers and a perfectly curated itinerary, this day trip guarantees a magical blend of nature, culture, and entertainment.

Join Travelxploria for an enchanting journey to Bird Paradise Singapore, where nature comes alive! Our courteous representative will pick you up from your hotel in a comfortable, air-conditioned vehicle. Led by our expert guide, explore this breathtaking aviary teeming with thousands of exotic birds. Witness the vibrant macaws, graceful flamingos, and mighty eagles in beautifully crafted habitats. Engage in interactive feeding sessions and be amazed by spectacular bird shows. After a day filled with nature’s melodies and stunning sights, sit back and unwind as we drop you safely back at your hotel, ensuring a smooth and memorable experience.

A visit to Marina Bay is incomplete without experiencing the SkyPark Observation Deck, offering stunning views 57 stories above Singapore. Begin your day with a delightful breakfast before our expert Travelxploria guide picks you up from your hotel. At the SkyPark, indulge in a luxurious wine-and-dine experience, enjoy the breathtaking skyline, and shop for exclusive souvenirs while gazing at the world’s largest infinity pool. With our convenient hotel pickup and drop-off, you can relax and soak in the unforgettable sights of Singapore’s iconic Marina Bay.

On your visit to Sentosa Island, join Travelxploria for a thrilling ride on the iconic cable car that connects Faber Peak to the island. Enjoy a 30-minute journey offering 360-degree views of Singapore’s lush forests, impressive skyscrapers, and serene sandy beaches as you travel nearly 5 kilometers. Travelxploria’s representative will be with you throughout the experience, ensuring your comfort and providing fascinating insights along the way. The trip includes convenient pick-up from your hotel, so you can relax and enjoy the seamless start to your adventure. Once you’ve taken in the stunning sights from the cable car, you’ll be dropped off back at your hotel, completing the perfect, hassle-free experience. This journey offers the ideal mix of nature and cityscape, all guided by a Travelxploria expert.

packages.overview:
• Singapore Duck Tours & ArtScience Museum – Embark on a fun-filled, interactive journey through Singapore’s iconic sights and explore the innovative, hands-on exhibitions at the ArtScience Museum.

  • Universal Studios Singapore – Enjoy an adrenaline-pumping, action-packed day with thrilling, movie-themed rides inspired by blockbusters like Transformers and Jurassic Park.

  • Sentosa Island & Skyline Luge – Unleash your adventurous spirit at Sentosa, from the exciting Hydrodash water park to the exhilarating, fast-paced Skyline Luge.

  • Singapore Zoo & Bird Paradise – Discover a wildlife paradise, where majestic creatures roam naturalistic habitats and thousands of vibrant, exotic birds soar in expansive aviaries.

  • River Wonders & Night Safari – Explore fascinating, river-themed ecosystems, meet charming pandas, and embark on a magical, nocturnal adventure at the world-famous Night Safari.

  • Scenic Singapore River Cruise – Drift along the picturesque, historical Singapore River, witnessing the city’s stunning, modern-meets-heritage skyline.

  • Gardens by the Bay & Merlion Park – Marvel at futuristic, lush landscapes, towering Supertrees, and Singapore’s iconic majestic Merlion with breathtaking Marina Bay Sands views.

  • National Museum & Singapore Art Museum – Immerse yourself in rich, captivating history and thought-provoking, inspiring art exhibits blending culture, technology, and creativity.

","day_element":[{"type":"transfer","transferDetails":{"transferType":"Private","transferIn":"Cab","from":"Singapore Changi Airport","to":"Singapore","splitStops":[]}},{"type":"hotel","groupedData":{"3":[{"h_id":322,"h_name":"ibis budget Singapore Imperial","h_country":"Singapore","h_city":"Singapore","h_type":"Hotel","h_rating":"3","status":"A","h_images":null,"supplier":null,"inserted_by_id":"Shouvik","edited_by_id":null,"price":null,"room_type":null,"images":"[{\"path\":\"/Hotels/Singapore/ibis budget Singapore Imperial/1739443984165-ibis budget Singapore Imperial 1.jpg\"},{\"path\":\"/Hotels/Singapore/ibis budget Singapore Imperial/1739443984245-ibis budget Singapore Imperial 2.jpg\"}]"}],"4":[{"h_id":329,"h_name":"Hotel Boss","h_country":"Singapore","h_city":"Singapore","h_type":"Hotel","h_rating":"4","status":"A","h_images":null,"supplier":null,"inserted_by_id":"Shouvik","edited_by_id":null,"price":null,"room_type":null,"images":"[{\"path\":\"/Hotels/Singapore/Hotel Boss/1739445152679-The Boss Hotel 2.jpg\"},{\"path\":\"/Hotels/Singapore/Hotel Boss/1739445152792-The Boss Hotel 3.jpg\"},{\"path\":\"/Hotels/Singapore/Hotel Boss/1739445152816-The Boss Hotel.jpg\"}]"}],"5":[{"h_id":333,"h_name":"Sofitel Singapore City Centre","h_country":"Singapore","h_city":"Singapore","h_type":"Hotel","h_rating":"5","status":"A","h_images":null,"supplier":null,"inserted_by_id":"Shouvik","edited_by_id":null,"price":null,"room_type":null,"images":"[{\"path\":\"/Hotels/Singapore/Sofitel Singapore City Centre/1739446036940-Sofitel Singapore City Centre 1.jpg\"},{\"path\":\"/Hotels/Singapore/Sofitel Singapore City Centre/1739446037057-Sofitel Singapore City Centre 2.jpg\"},{\"path\":\"/Hotels/Singapore/Sofitel Singapore City Centre/1739446037065-Sofitel Singapore City Centre.jpg\"}]"}]}}]},{"day_title":"Discover Singapore: Duck Tours & ArtScience Museum","day_summary":"

Kickstart your Singapore adventure with the thrilling Singapore Duck Tours, an exciting land-and-water experience that takes you past iconic landmarks like Little India, Orchard Road, and Chinatown. Enjoy a unique perspective of the city as you cruise along the waters, soaking in its vibrant sights. Later, visit the mesmerizing ArtScience Museum, a stunning lotus-shaped landmark that blends art, science, culture, and technology. With interactive and hands-on exhibits, this museum offers an engaging experience for all ages, making it a must-visit attraction. Immerse yourself in creativity and innovation as you explore the wonders of Singapore!

","day_element":[]},{"day_title":"Ultimate Adventure at Universal Studios Singapore","day_summary":"


Step into the world of movie magic at Universal Studios Singapore, a thrilling theme park packed with action and adventure! Experience heart-pounding rides inspired by blockbuster films like Transformers, where you battle Decepticons in an exhilarating 3D ride, or take on the Jurassic Park Rapids Adventure for a wild water escapade. Explore themed zones like Hollywood, Ancient Egypt, and Sci-Fi City, each offering immersive attractions and live entertainment. Whether you're a thrill-seeker or a movie lover, Universal Studios guarantees a day of non-stop excitement, making it a must-visit highlight of your Singapore trip!

","day_element":[]},{"day_title":"Thrilling Sentosa Adventure","day_summary":"


Spend an action-packed day at Sentosa Island, Singapore’s ultimate playground for all ages! Dive into fun at Hy﻿drodash, a giant floating water park with exciting obstacle courses and designated zones for kids. For adrenaline junkies, hop onto the Skyline Luge, a thrilling three-wheeled cart ride that lets you race down winding tracks, offering an exhilarating experience for both the young and the young at heart. Whether you’re seeking adventure, relaxation, or family fun, Sentosa’s endless attractions make for an unforgettable day filled with excitement and laughter!

","day_element":[]},{"day_title":"Ultimate Wildlife Adventure: Singapore Zoo, Bird Paradise, River Wonders & Night Safari","day_summary":"

Experience the best of Singapore’s wildlife attractions in a single day! Begin at the Singapore Zoo, where its open-concept design lets animals roam freely in naturalistic habitats, providing an immersive experience. Next, explore Bird Paradise, home to over 5,000 birds across 400 species, with engaging exhibits and conservation-focused bird shows. Continue your journey at River Wonders, a unique river-themed wildlife park featuring ecosystems from the Amazon, Nile, and Yangtze, where you can see giant pandas, manatees, and exotic freshwater species. As night falls, embark on the Night Safari, an exhilarating journey through the world’s first nocturnal zoo, where you can spot fascinating night creatures on a guided tram ride or walking trails. A truly unforgettable day for nature lovers!

","day_element":[]},{"day_title":"Full Day Singapore City Tour","day_summary":"

Experience the best of Singapore with our full-day city tour, covering iconic landmarks and cultural gems. Begin with a visit to the stunning Marina Bay Sands and the Merlion Park for breathtaking skyline views. Explore the vibrant streets of Chinatown and Little India, immersing yourself in rich heritage and flavors. Discover the futuristic Gardens by the Bay and the mesmerizing Supertree Grove. Enjoy a scenic drive through Orchard Road and the colonial district before visiting Sentosa Island for thrilling attractions. packages.overview:
• Canopy Park Adventure – Explore lush indoor gardens, a mirror maze, and breathtaking attractions at Jewel Changi.
  • Thrilling Night Safari – Witness over 2,500 nocturnal animals in their natural habitat on a guided tram ride.
  • Iconic City Tour – Discover Marina Bay Sands, Merlion Park, Chinatown, and Little India on a flexible Hop-On Hop-Off tour.
  • Gardens by the Bay – Marvel at the Supertree Grove, Cloud Forest, and Flower Dome with stunning city views.
  • Universal Studios Excitement – Experience exhilarating rides, immersive attractions, and beloved movie characters in seven themed zones.
  • Sentosa Island Escapade – Enjoy pristine beaches, thrilling theme parks, and adventure-packed activities.
  • S.E.A. Aquarium – Explore a breathtaking underwater world with over 100,000 marine creatures across 45 habitats.
  • Wings of Time Spectacle – End the night with a dazzling display of lights, water, and pyrotechnics by the sea.
  • Singapore River Cruise – A scenic boat ride offering picturesque views of historic landmarks and modern architecture.
  • Mandai Wildlife Reserve – Discover the Singapore Zoo, River Wonders, and Bird Paradise in a nature-filled adventure.
  • Breakfast in the Wild – Enjoy a unique dining experience with orangutans at the Singapore Zoo.
  • National Museum & Art Museum – Immerse yourself in Singapore’s rich history and contemporary art scene.
  • Resorts World Sentosa – Visit top attractions, including Madame Tussauds, Mega Adventure Park, and Adventure Cove Waterpark.
  • Fantasy World & Ice Cream Museum – Step into a whimsical world of fun exhibits and delicious treats.
  • Singapore Cable Car Ride – Enjoy breathtaking aerial views of Mount Faber and Sentosa.
  • Merlion Park – Capture picture-perfect moments at Singapore’s iconic symbol near Marina Bay.
  • Avatar Experience at Gardens by the Bay – Step into a bioluminescent world inspired by the film Avatar.

Dive into Singapore’s rich heritage at the National Museum of Singapore, where interactive exhibits and historical artifacts bring the country’s story to life. From its early days to its modern identity, this immersive experience offers a deeper understanding of Singapore’s transformation.

Next, explore the Singapore Art Museum, an architectural gem blending art, science, culture, and technology. With its ever-evolving interactive exhibitions, this museum captivates visitors of all ages, making it an engaging and inspiring experience. Whether you're an art enthusiast or a curious explorer, these museums offer a perfect blend of history, creativity, and innovation.

","day_element":[]},{"day_title":"Exploring Singapore’s Icons: Gardens by the Bay & Merlion Park","day_summary":"

Experience the perfect blend of nature and innovation at Gardens by the Bay, where the towering Supertree Grove, misty Cloud Forest, and vibrant Flower Dome showcase exotic plants from around the world against the backdrop of Singapore’s stunning skyline. Wander through this futuristic garden wonderland, capturing breathtaking views at every turn. Then, head to Merlion Park, home to Singapore’s iconic lion-headed, fish-bodied statue, symbolizing the city’s rich heritage. Set against the dazzling Marina Bay Sands, this picturesque spot offers the perfect opportunity to soak in the city's beauty and snap unforgettable photos.

","day_element":[]},{"day_title":"Singapore River Cruise","day_summary":"

Experience the charm of Singapore from a unique perspective with a Singapore River Cruise, where history and modernity blend seamlessly. Glide along the iconic Singapore River, passing by historic landmarks like the Merlion, the vibrant Clarke Quay, and beautifully preserved colonial buildings. As the city lights reflect on the water, soak in breathtaking views of Singapore’s evolving skyline. This relaxing boat ride offers a perfect way to discover the city's rich heritage while enjoying a tranquil escape from the bustling streets.

","day_element":[]},{"day_title":"Farewell Singapore","day_summary":"

After a delightful breakfast, check out from your hotel and enjoy a seamless transfer to Changi International Airport, arranged by Travelxploria’s best on-ground support. Take a moment to reflect on the unforgettable experiences, from iconic landmarks and thrilling attractions to cultural discoveries and serene landscapes. As you board your flight home, cherish the wonderful memories of your Singapore adventure, knowing that another exciting journey awaits in the future. Safe travels and see you again soon!

From a thrilling Night Safari that brings you face-to-face with elusive nocturnal wildlife to a panoramic ascent atop Marina Bay Sands SkyPark, our comprehensive sightseeing tour showcases the city’s most iconic landmarks. Feel your heart race on Sentosa Island—whether you’re marveling at the Wings of Time light show, savoring beachside relaxation at Siloso, or riding the waves of Adventure Cove Waterpark. Aquarium. With luxurious transfers and handpicked shopping and cultural experiences, Travelxploria ensures your journey is as seamless as it is sensational.

Aquarium, one of the world’s largest, where you’ll be mesmerized by 100,000 marine animals across 45 habitats. If visiting during the holidays, dive into the fun with the Splashtacular Christmas, featuring thrilling waterslides and a relaxing lazy river. As the sun sets, prepare for the Wings of Time—a breathtaking spectacle of lasers, pyrotechnics, water fountains, and 3D mapping, telling the tale of a mythical bird’s epic journey through time.

","day_element":[]},{"day_title":"A Minion’s Perspective Experience: Sentosa’s Best from Above & Beyond","day_summary":"

Begin your adventure with a breathtaking ride on the Singapore Cable Car, offering panoramic 360-degree views of Mount Faber’s lush greenery and the scenic Sentosa coastline. With Travelxploria’s best on-ground support and seamless transfers, you’ll effortlessly reach top attractions like MegaZip, Universal Studios Singapore, and Siloso Beach. Sentosa Island is a paradise of contrasts—relax on pristine beaches, dive into underwater wonders at S.E.A. Aquarium, or feel the thrill at Universal Studios. As night falls, witness the stunning Wings of Time show, an enchanting spectacle of lights and water, making Sentosa a truly unforgettable destination.

","day_element":[]},{"day_title":"A Magical Journey: Avatar Experience at Gardens by the Bay","day_summary":"

Step into a world of wonder at Gardens by the Bay, where nature and fantasy merge into an extraordinary experience. With Travelxploria’s seamless transfers and best on-ground support, enjoy a stress-free visit to this iconic attraction. As night falls, watch the gardens transform into Pandora, the breathtaking world from Avatar. Wander through bioluminescent landscapes, encounter lifelike animatronic banshees, and immerse yourself in the mystical beauty of this cinematic spectacle. Against the backdrop of the Supertree Grove and Cloud Forest, this one-of-a-kind adventure promises to be a highlight of your Singapore journey.

","day_element":[]},{"day_title":"Mandai Wildlife Adventure","day_summary":"

Start your day with an extraordinary wildlife experience as Travelxploria’s expert team ensures a seamless pick-up and drop-off for a hassle-free journey to Mandai. Enjoy Breakfast in the Wild at Singapore Zoo, where you can savor delicious local and international delights while watching orangutans gracefully swing through the treetops. After breakfast, explore the open-concept zoo, home to a diverse range of animals in lush, natural habitats. Continue your adventure at Mandai River Wonders, Asia’s only river-themed wildlife park, where you’ll encounter giant pandas at the Yangtze River zone, majestic Indian gharials of the Ganges, and playful squirrel monkeys in Wild Amazonia. A perfect blend of nature, wildlife, and unforgettable moments.

","day_element":[]},{"day_title":"Farewell Singapore","day_summary":"

After a delightful breakfast, bid farewell to Singapore as Travelxploria’s dedicated representative ensures a smooth check-out and hassle-free airport transfer. Enjoy a relaxed ride to Changi Airport, reflecting on the incredible experiences, breathtaking sights, and unforgettable adventures from your journey. Whether it was the thrilling attractions, vibrant cityscapes, or serene natural wonders, your Singapore trip has been nothing short of extraordinary. As you board your flight home, take with you beautiful memories and a heart full of wanderlust.

  • Breathtaking Marina Bay Sands SkyPark Views
    Rise high above the city with Travelxploria and soak in stunning panoramic views from the iconic Marina Bay Sands SkyPark observation deck.
    Futuristic Gardens by the Bay with Supertree Grove & Cloud Forest
  • Wander through a dreamscape of towering Supertrees and mist-covered waterfalls at Gardens by the Bay, exclusively arranged by Travelxploria for a magical experience.
    Ultimate Movie Magic at Universal Studios
    Unleash your inner adventurer with Travelxploria at Universal Studios, where thrilling rides and cinematic worlds bring your favorite movies to life.
  • Exciting Rides & Live Entertainment
    From adrenaline-pumping roller coasters to dazzling live shows, Travelxploria ensures you skip the lines and dive straight into the action-packed fun.
  • Action-Packed Sentosa Island Adventure
    Travelxploria crafts the perfect Sentosa Island day, packed with beach fun, thrilling attractions, and endless adventures for the whole family.
  • Mesmerizing Wings of Time Light & Water Show
    End your evening with Travelxploria's special seating for the spectacular Wings of Time show—a breathtaking blend of lasers, fountains, and pyrotechnics.
    Memorable Shopping & Cultural Experiences
    Discover the best of Singapore’s shopping and vibrant culture with Travelxploria’s handpicked tours of Orchard Road, local markets, and heritage streets.
  • Luxurious & Comfortable Transfers
    Travelxploria provides seamless, air-conditioned luxury transfers throughout your trip, ensuring every journey is as comfortable as the destination.
  • Tropical Island Relaxation at Siloso Beach
    Sink your toes into golden sands and unwind at Siloso Beach, where Travelxploria offers the perfect mix of tropical relaxation and island vibes.
  • Adrenaline-Pumping Adventure Cove Waterpark
    Splash into excitement at Adventure Cove with Travelxploria, where high-speed rides, lazy rivers, and snorkeling adventures await.
  • Vibrant Chinatown & Little India Exploration
    Explore the colorful streets of Chinatown and Little India with Travelxploria, diving deep into rich traditions, bustling markets, and delicious flavors.
  • Delightful Local & International Cuisine
    Taste Singapore’s culinary wonders curated by Travelxploria, from vibrant hawker fare to elegant international dining experiences.
  • Unforgettable Photo Moments at Merlion Park
    Capture picture-perfect memories at the iconic Merlion Park, with Travelxploria guiding you to the best spots and moments.
  • Fascinating Marine Life at S.E.A. Aquarium
    Dive into the magical underwater world of S.E.A. Aquarium with Travelxploria, where thousands of marine species mesmerize and inspire.

As you settle into your hotel, soak in the city’s stunning skyline and tropical charm. In the evening, embark on an unforgettable adventure at the world-famous Night Safari Zoo. This immersive experience, blending thrill and education, is the perfect way to kickstart your Singapore journey.

Hotel.jpg\"}]"}]}}]},{"day_title":"Singapore City Wonders: Marina Bay Sands & Gardens by the Bay","day_summary":"

Start your day with an exciting city sightseeing tour, effortlessly arranged by Travelxploria’s expert team, ensuring seamless pick-up and drop-off with the best on-ground support. Explore iconic landmarks, from the historic Raffles Hotel to the vibrant Civic District, immersing yourself in Singapore’s rich heritage. Next, ascend to the Marina Bay Sands SkyPark, where breathtaking panoramic views of the city skyline and Marina Bay unfold before you. In the afternoon, step into the magical Gardens by the Bay, where the futuristic Supertree Grove, misty Cloud Forest, and colorful Flower Dome create an enchanting escape into nature’s wonders.

","day_element":[]},{"day_title":"Ultimate Universal Studios Adventure","day_summary":"

Get ready for an action-packed day at Universal Studios Singapore, with Travelxploria’s seamless transfers and best on-ground support ensuring a stress-free experience. Step into a world of movie magic, where thrilling rides, immersive attractions, and live entertainment bring your favorite films to life. Brace yourself for adrenaline-pumping roller coasters like Battlestar Galactica, embark on the Transformers 3D Ride, or journey through the Jurassic Park Rapids Adventure. From exciting stunt shows to meeting beloved characters, this theme park promises fun for all ages. A must-visit for movie lovers and thrill-seekers alike!

","day_element":[]},{"day_title":"Sentosa Island Adventure & Mesmerizing Wings of Time Show","day_summary":"

Embark on an unforgettable day trip to Sentosa Island with Travelxploria’s best on-ground support, ensuring seamless transfers and a hassle-free experience. Discover a world of excitement, from exploring the wonders of the ocean at S.E.A. Aquarium to the thrilling slides of Adventure Cove Waterpark. Unwind on pristine beaches, soak in the island’s vibrant atmosphere, and enjoy its top attractions. As night falls, witness the Wings of Time show, a breathtaking spectacle of water, light, lasers, and fire effects, set against the sea—an enchanting finale to your perfect Sentosa getaway.

","day_element":[]},{"day_title":"Farewell Singapore","day_summary":"

As your incredible Singapore adventure comes to an end, Travelxploria ensures a seamless departure with hassle-free transfers and the best on-ground support. Spend your final hours indulging in some last-minute shopping, picking up souvenirs at vibrant markets or luxury malls. Savor a relaxing coffee at a chic café or take a leisurely stroll through the city one last time. With a heart full of unforgettable memories, head to the airport for your onward journey, cherishing the experiences that made your Singapore trip truly extraordinary. Until next time, Singapore!

packages.overview: Embark on an unforgettable Southeast Asian adventure with Travelxploria, beginning in Kuala Lumpur where you’ll marvel at Putrajaya’s modern splendor and the towering Petronas Twin Towers. Ascend to the cool heights of Genting Highlands for entertainment, shopping, and a thrilling cable car ride before diving into a full day of water slides and amusement-packed fun at Sunway Lagoon. Continue your city discoveries with a guided Kuala Lumpur tour, then journey to vibrant Singapore to wander Marina Bay’s waterfront, plunge into blockbuster thrills at Universal Studios, and unwind on Sentosa Island—complete with beaches, iconic attractions, and the mesmerizing Wings of Time show. Cap off your journey with a curated Singapore city tour, board a luxury cruise for days of scenic ocean relaxation and onboard delights, and finally disembark for your seamless transfer to Changi Airport—courtesy of Travelxploria’s meticulous planning and seamless service.

With our experienced tour guide and best on-ground support staff, enjoy a seamless transfer to your hotel, where you can unwind after your journey. Once refreshed, embark on an exciting tour of Putrajaya, Malaysia’s stunning administrative capital, known for its grand architecture and serene landscapes. Stroll through its beautifully designed bridges, waterfront parks, and iconic structures. Later, head to the world-famous Petronas Twin Towers for a breathtaking photo stop, capturing the towering beauty of this architectural marvel. Whether it’s the city’s modern skyline or its cultural charm, our expert team ensures a smooth, hassle-free experience from arrival to exploration. As the evening unfolds, immerse yourself in Kuala Lumpur’s vibrant ambiance before returning to your hotel, setting the perfect tone for the adventures ahead.

Start your day with a seamless pick-up as our Travelxploria representative and experienced tour guide welcome you for a breathtaking journey to Genting Highlands. Sit back and enjoy the scenic drive as we leave behind the bustling streets of Kuala Lumpur, ascending into the cool, misty heights of Malaysia’s premier hill resort. With the best on-ground support staff ensuring a smooth experience, arrive at the base station for an unforgettable Awana Skyway cable car ride, offering panoramic views of the lush rainforest below.

Once at the top, immerse yourself in a world of entertainment—try your luck at the famous casino, explore the indoor theme parks, or indulge in a shopping spree at Genting Premium Outlets. Whether you seek adventure or relaxation, our team ensures a hassle-free experience, making this highland retreat a perfect blend of thrill and tranquility.

Gear up for an action-packed day as our Travelxploria representative and experienced tour guide ensure a seamless pick-up, taking you to Malaysia’s ultimate theme park—Sunway Lagoon. With the best on-ground support staff handling every detail, you can focus on the fun from the moment you arrive.

Dive into adventure at the Water Park, where exhilarating slides and wave pools promise endless thrills. Experience heart-pounding rides at the Amusement Park, encounter exotic animals at the Wildlife Park, and conquer the spooky zones at Scream Park. For adrenaline junkies, the Extreme Park offers bungee jumping and ATV rides.

Whether you're riding the Vuvuzela, Asia’s largest water ride, or simply floating along the lazy river, Sunway Lagoon guarantees fun for all ages. As the sun sets, our team ensures a smooth drop-off, leaving you with memories of a truly spectacular day.

With the best on-ground support staff, you can seamlessly navigate through the park’s thrilling zones—from heart-racing rides at the Extreme Park to close encounters with wildlife at the Wildlife Park.

After an adrenaline-fueled morning, transition into the cultural heartbeat of Kuala Lumpur with a short city tour. Witness the grandeur of Merdeka Square, the beauty of the National Mosque, and the energy of Chinatown. Capture stunning city views with a photo stop at the Petronas Twin Towers, an iconic landmark of Malaysia.

As the day winds down, our team ensures a smooth drop-off at your hotel, leaving you with unforgettable memories of adventure and culture, seamlessly woven together.

Universal Studios Singapore is a world-class theme park located on Sentosa Island, offering a thrilling experience with seven uniquely themed zones, including Hollywood, Sci-Fi City, Jurassic Park, and Far Far Away. Visitors can enjoy exciting rides like Transformers: The Ride and Battlestar Galactica, immersive 4D shows, live entertainment, and meet iconic movie characters. Marvel at the architectural brilliance of Marina Bay Sands, stroll through the lush beauty of Gardens by the Bay, and capture the perfect photo at the iconic Merlion—a true symbol of the Lion City.

Glide along Singapore’s coastline, taking in breathtaking views of the skyline and nearby islands. As the sun sets, the evening is yours to embrace—whether it’s indulging in waterfront dining, exploring vibrant nightlife, or unwinding under the city lights, Travelxploria guarantees a seamless and memorable journey.

","day_element":[{"type":"transfer","transferDetails":{"transferType":"Private","transferIn":"Cab","from":"Singapore","to":"Singapore Cruise","splitStops":[]}}]},{"day_title":"Singapore City Tour - Cruise","day_summary":"

Whether you choose to take a refreshing dip in the on-board pools, savor gourmet delights at world-class restaurants, or enjoy live entertainment, every moment is crafted for your comfort.

With the expertise of our experienced tour guide, explore the many activities offered by the cruise—be it a rejuvenating spa session, a thrilling sports deck challenge, or simply lounging on the sun-kissed deck, taking in the breathtaking ocean views. Our best on-ground support staff is always at your service, ensuring your every need is met with ease. Let the gentle sea breeze and the rhythm of the waves refresh your soul before you return to land, carrying the serenity of the sea with you.

","day_element":[]},{"day_title":"Departure","day_summary":"

After a delightful breakfast, it's time to bid farewell to the incredible journey that took you through the wonders of Malaysia and Singapore. With Travelxploria’s representative ensuring a smooth and stress-free departure, you will be seamlessly transferred to Singapore Changi Airport. Our experienced tour guide and best on-ground support staff will be there to assist you, making sure every last detail is taken care of, allowing you to focus on cherishing the memories you've made.

From the bustling streets of Kuala Lumpur to the thrills of Genting Highlands, the excitement of Sentosa, and the luxury of your cruise experience, each moment has been carefully curated to give you an unparalleled adventure. As you board your flight home, take a moment to reflect on the breathtaking sights, the cultural experiences, and the joy-filled moments that will stay with you forever. Safe travels, and we look forward to welcoming you on another journey soon.

packages.overview:
• Iconic Singapore City Tour – Explore vibrant Chinatown, colorful Little India, stunning Marina Bay Sands, and historic Merlion Park with breathtaking cityscape views.

  • Sentosa Island Adventure – Thrilling rides, mesmerizing aquariums, golden beaches, and an awe-inspiring cable car ride with stunning panoramic island views.

  • SkyPark & Gardens by the Bay – Spectacular city skyline, futuristic Supertrees, misty Cloud Forest, and vibrant floral displays at the enchanting Flower Dome.

  • Ultimate Universal Studios Experience – Adrenaline-pumping rides, immersive themed worlds, action-packed adventures, and unforgettable encounters with favorite movie characters.

Relax as you're comfortably transferred to your hotel, where you can unwind and freshen up after your journey. Start your day with an exciting half-day Singapore City Tour, seamlessly arranged by our Travelxploria representative, ensuring the best on-ground support and smooth transfers. Begin at Merlion Park, where you can capture iconic photos with the legendary lion statue against the stunning city skyline. Next, admire the architectural marvel of Marina Bay Sands and enjoy breathtaking waterfront views along the Esplanade. Immerse yourself in the vibrant cultures of Chinatown, Little India, and Kampong Glam, each offering a unique blend of heritage, flavors, and traditions. Experience the heart of Singapore’s diversity in just a few unforgettable hours.

","day_element":[]},{"day_title":"Sentosa Island Adventure","day_summary":"

Get ready for an exciting day at Sentosa Island, Singapore’s premier resort destination, with seamless transfers and the best on-ground support from our Travelxploria representative. Dive into the underwater wonders at the S.E.A. Aquarium, home to thousands of marine species, or feel the adrenaline at Adventure Cove Waterpark with thrilling water slides. Unwind on the golden sands of Siloso Beach, soaking in the tropical vibes. If you’re up for more excitement, explore Universal Studios Singapore for movie-themed rides. End your day with a Sentosa Cable Car ride, offering stunning panoramic views of the island and coastline.

","day_element":[]},{"day_title":"Marina Bay SkyPark & Gardens by the Bay","day_summary":"

Experience the best of Singapore’s skyline with a seamless tour arranged by Travelxploria, ensuring smooth transfers and top-notch on-ground support. Start your morning at the Marina Bay Sands SkyPark, where breathtaking panoramic views of the city await from the iconic observation deck. Next, immerse yourself in the futuristic beauty of Gardens by the Bay, home to the mesmerizing Supertree Grove and the misty wonders of the Cloud Forest. Don’t miss the Flower Dome, an enchanting showcase of exotic plants from across the globe, making this an unforgettable journey into Singapore’s architectural and natural marvels.

","day_element":[]},{"day_title":"Ultimate Universal Studios Singapore Experience","day_summary":"

Get ready for a thrilling adventure at Universal Studios Singapore, with Travelxploria ensuring seamless transfers and the best on-ground support for a hassle-free day. Step into a world of movie magic as you explore immersive zones inspired by Hollywood blockbusters. Brace yourself for heart-pounding rides like the Transformers Ride, Jurassic Park Rapids Adventure, and the high-speed Battlestar Galactica roller coasters. Wander through fantastical worlds like Far Far Away and Ancient Egypt, meet your favorite characters, and capture unforgettable moments. Refuel at themed restaurants and grab exclusive souvenirs, making this an action-packed and unforgettable day of fun!

","day_element":[]},{"day_title":"Farewell Singapore","day_summary":"

As your incredible 6-day Singapore adventure comes to an end, enjoy a seamless and stress-free departure with Travelxploria’s best on-ground support ensuring a smooth transfer to the airport. Reflect on the unforgettable experiences—from exploring iconic landmarks and thrilling theme parks to indulging in vibrant culture and world-class attractions. Whether it was the dazzling cityscape, exciting adventures, or delicious cuisine, Singapore has left you with cherished memories. Board your flight with a heart full of experiences and a promise to return for more! Safe travels.

packages.overview: Embark on an unforgettable Southeast Asian voyage with Travelxploria, beginning in Singapore where you’ll delve into the vibrant streets of Chinatown and Little India before capturing iconic shots at Merlion Park. Wander beneath the towering Supertrees and misty Cloud Forest at Gardens by the Bay, then board your luxury cruise for a day of relaxation, gourmet dining, and panoramic ocean vistas. Return to Singapore’s thrills with exclusive access to Universal Studios and a day of adventure on Sentosa Island—exploring the S.E.A. Aquarium, racing through Adventure Cove Waterpark, and witnessing the magical Wings of Time. Cross into Kuala Lumpur to marvel at the Petronas Twin Towers, haggle in bustling markets, and explore city landmarks, then ascend to Genting Highlands for scenic cable car rides and theme-park fun. Back in Kuala Lumpur, discover the sacred Batu Caves, sample local flavors at street markets, and experience Bukit Bintang’s nightlife before Travelxploria ensures a seamless airport transfer for your journey home.

Embark on a scenic journey to Genting Highlands, where our Travelxploria representative ensures a seamless and comfortable ride to this breathtaking hill resort. As you ascend, let our experienced tour guide from Travelxploria share fascinating insights about this high-altitude paradise. Upon arrival, take a thrilling ride on the Awana Skyway cable car, offering panoramic vistas of the lush rainforest and mist-covered mountains.

Once at the top, immerse yourself in a world of entertainment—whether you’re trying your luck at the famous casinos, exploring the indoor and outdoor theme parks, or indulging in retail therapy at luxury shopping malls. Our best on-ground support staff is always ready to assist, ensuring a smooth and enjoyable experience. From thrilling attractions to exquisite dining, Genting Highlands offers a perfect blend of adventure and relaxation, making it a must-visit destination in Malaysia.

With our best on-ground support staff ensuring a hassle-free experience, enjoy a night of entertainment, dining, and unforgettable city vibes.

After a smooth return to Kuala Lumpur, facilitated by our Travelxploria representative, get ready for an exciting day of exploration. Our experienced tour guide from Travelxploria will lead you to the Batu Caves, an awe-inspiring Hindu pilgrimage site nestled within limestone cliffs. Climb the colorful steps and witness the magnificent golden statue of Lord Murugan before stepping into the sacred caves.

Next, dive into the rich heritage of Malaysia at the Islamic Arts Museum, where stunning exhibits showcase Islamic architecture, calligraphy, and artifacts. Stroll through the vibrant local markets, where you can bargain for souvenirs and sample delicious Malaysian street food. As night falls, experience the buzzing atmosphere of Bukit Bintang, Kuala Lumpur’s premier entertainment and shopping district. With the best on-ground support staff from Travelxploria ensuring a hassle-free experience, enjoy a perfect mix of shopping, dining, and nightlife in the heart of the city.

packages.overview: Embark on an exhilarating journey with Travelxploria, touching down in Kuala Lumpur where you’ll be whisked to your hotel to unwind before diving into the city’s vibrant street life. Venture up to Genting Highlands for theme-park thrills, boutique shopping, and sweeping mountain vistas, then return to explore Kuala Lumpur’s cultural crown jewels—marvel at the Petronas Twin Towers, ascend the sacred Batu Caves, and stroll through historic neighborhoods. Next, cross into Singapore by air or road and discover the glittering waterfront of Marina Bay before delving into the city’s heart on a guided tour of Merlion Park, Chinatown, and other iconic landmarks. Cap off your adventure with heart-pounding rides and movie-magic attractions at Universal Studios Singapore, then savor final moments of shopping and relaxation before Travelxploria ensures your seamless departure home.

Embark on an unforgettable Half Day City Tour of Kuala Lumpur with Travelxploria’s expert representatives ensuring a seamless experience from start to finish. Our experienced tour guide will take you on a journey through the city’s rich cultural heritage and modern marvels, making every stop insightful and engaging. Capture stunning photos at the Petronas Twin Towers, King's Palace, National Monument, and the National Mosque, while learning fascinating stories behind these landmarks. Visit the Cocoa Centre, where you can explore Malaysia’s renowned chocolate industry and sample delicious treats. Our tour also takes you to the historic Independence Square, a symbol of Malaysia’s journey to freedom, where you can immerse yourself in the city's vibrant energy. With Travelxploria’s best on-ground support staff, seamless pick-up and drop-off services, and a carefully curated itinerary, this tour guarantees a hassle-free and enriching experience in Malaysia’s dynamic capital.

packages.overview: Embark on a seamless Southeast Asian escape with Travelxploria, beginning in Singapore where you’ll be greeted and transferred to your hotel for a leisurely welcome. Dive into island thrills on Sentosa—with round-trip cable car rides and Siloso Beach lounging—before immersing yourself in the region’s botanical wonders at the National Orchid Garden and Gardens by the Bay. Next, fly to idyllic Langkawi for an exclusive Rainforest & Waterfall Explorer tour, followed by a Wildlife Paradise & Island Discovery adventure showcasing mangrove ecosystems and hidden coves. Finally, savor your last moments of tropical relaxation before Travelxploria ensures your smooth departure home.

Kickstart your day with an exhilarating two-way Sentosa Cable Car ride, where breathtaking panoramic views of the city and coastline unfold before your eyes. Our representative from Travelxploria will ensure a seamless pick-up from your hotel, making your journey effortless. As you glide above the cityscape, our experienced tour guide from Travelxploria will share fascinating insights about Singapore’s skyline and Sentosa’s vibrant history.

Upon arrival, step into the tropical paradise of Siloso Beach, where sun-kissed sands and gentle waves invite you to unwind. Whether you choose to relax, take a refreshing dip, or stroll along the scenic shore, the experience is pure bliss. Our best on-ground support staff from Travelxploria will be at your service throughout, ensuring a hassle-free experience. After a rejuvenating day by the beach, enjoy a comfortable drop-off back to your hotel, leaving you with cherished memories of Sentosa’s charm.

Begin your day with a seamless pick-up by our Travelxploria representative, ensuring a smooth journey to the breathtaking National Orchid Garden. As you step into this floral paradise, our experienced tour guide from Travelxploria will lead you through a mesmerizing display of over 1,000 orchid species, sharing fascinating stories about these exotic blooms. Stroll through vibrant, meticulously curated gardens at your own pace. After a refreshing experience, our best on-ground support staff will ensure a comfortable drop-off back to your hotel.

Begin your day with a delicious breakfast, followed by a comfortable pick-up from your hotel with our Travelxploria guide. Explore the iconic Gardens by the Bay, a futuristic oasis blending nature and technology. Wander through the breathtaking Supertree Grove, marveling at the towering vertical gardens. Step into the climate-controlled wonders of the Flower Dome, showcasing global flora, and the mystical Cloud Forest, with its spectacular indoor waterfall. After an unforgettable experience, we’ll ensure a smooth drop-off back to your hotel.

Resort 3.jpg\"}]"}]}}]},{"day_title":"Langkawi Wildlife Paradise – Island Discovery","day_summary":"

Get ready for an exciting wildlife adventure with Travelxploria as we take you to the Langkawi Wildlife Park, a paradise for animal lovers! Our friendly representative will pick you up from your hotel in a comfortable vehicle, ensuring a hassle-free journey. Led by our expert guide, explore this award-winning park, home to over 150 species of birds and animals from around the world. Feed friendly deer, marvel at vibrant macaws, and interact with adorable rabbits and exotic reptiles. Witness the fascinating walk-in aviary, where tropical birds fly freely around you. Enjoy engaging animal shows and learn about wildlife conservation in this immersive experience. Whether you're visiting with family or exploring solo, this trip promises unforgettable moments with nature. After a fun-filled and interactive visit, relax as we drop you back at your hotel, ensuring a seamless and memorable wildlife experience in Langkawi!

Set sail on an unforgettable Langkawi Island Hopping Tour with Travelxploria! Your adventure begins as our friendly representative picks you up from your hotel in a comfortable vehicle, ensuring a smooth start. Accompanied by our expert guide, hop on a speedboat and cruise across the sparkling Andaman Sea to explore Langkawi’s most breathtaking islands. Witness the mystical Pregnant Maiden Lake, known for its serene beauty and legendary fertility myths. Marvel at the majestic eagles feeding at Singa Besar Island, an awe-inspiring sight as they swoop down to catch their prey. Finally, relax on the pristine shores of Beras Basah Island, where you can sunbathe, swim, or simply soak in the tropical paradise. Throughout the journey, our guide shares fascinating stories and insights about Langkawi’s hidden gems. After an exhilarating island adventure, sit back and relax as we drop you back at your hotel, ensuring a hassle-free and memorable day.

packages.package_name: Fully Loaded Singapore and Malaysia Tour
packages.overview: Embark on a seamless Southeast Asian odyssey with Travelxploria: land in vibrant Singapore for leisurely exploration, a heritage-rich city and culture tour complete with a scenic river cruise, the National Museum, Gardens by the Bay, Peranakan immersion, and Chinatown discoveries. Journey by car to historic Malacca for an evening of riverside charm and A Famosa’s storied forts, then drive on to Kuala Lumpur to marvel at Merdeka Square, Batu Caves, and the Petronas Twin Towers. Escape to the cool heights of Cameron Highlands—with tea plantations, strawberry farms, and the mystical Mossy Forest—before crossing to Penang for George Town’s UNESCO heritage, Khoo Kongsi’s ornate clan house, and the colorful bustle of Little India. Finally, fly to idyllic Langkawi for two full days of island adventures—think Sky Bridge thrills or beachside bliss—before Travelxploria ensures your smooth transfer home from Langkawi Airport.

Begin your immersive cultural journey with a warm welcome from our Travelxploria representative, ensuring a seamless start to your day. Accompanied by our experienced Travelxploria tour guide, step into the vibrant streets of Chinatown, where heritage meets modern charm. Explore traditional shops, admire intricate architecture, and visit the sacred Buddha Tooth Relic Temple, a site of spiritual significance. Indulge in authentic local flavors before heading to Little India, where a burst of colors and exotic aromas transport you to a different world. Here, visit the historic Sri Veeramakaliamman Temple, a masterpiece of devotion and artistry. Finally, wander through Kampong Glam, the heart of Malay-Arab culture, where the majestic Sultan Mosque stands in grandeur. Shop for unique souvenirs in the lively alleys as our best on-ground support staff ensures a hassle-free experience with seamless pick-up and drop-off. With Travelxploria, every step is enriched with history, culture, and comfort.

Start your day with a delightful breakfast before our Travelxploria guide greets you for a convenient pick-up from your hotel. Explore Singapore’s rich heritage at the iconic National Museum of Singapore, where interactive exhibits and cultural artifacts bring history to life. Immerse yourself in captivating stories, from Singapore’s early beginnings to its vibrant modern identity. Our expert guide will ensure you experience every highlight of this cultural gem. After a day of discovery, enjoy a comfortable drop-off back to your hotel.​

Begin your day with a delicious breakfast, followed by a comfortable pick-up from your hotel with our Travelxploria guide. Explore the iconic Gardens by the Bay, a futuristic oasis blending nature and technology. Wander through the breathtaking Supertree Grove, marveling at the towering vertical gardens. Step into the climate-controlled wonders of the Flower Dome, showcasing global flora, and the mystical Cloud Forest, with its spectacular indoor waterfall. After an unforgettable experience, we’ll ensure a smooth drop-off back to your hotel.

Your Singapore adventure begins with a warm welcome from our Travelxploria representative, ensuring a seamless check-in and comfortable start to your journey. As the sun sets, our experienced Travelxploria tour guide leads you to the stunning Marina Bay, Singapore’s most iconic waterfront. Marvel at the legendary Merlion statue, capturing picture-perfect moments against the shimmering skyline. Stroll along the breathtaking Marina Bay Sands SkyPark, where panoramic city views leave you in awe. Our best on-ground support staff ensures a smooth and delightful experience as you soak in the lively atmosphere. As night falls, witness the Spectra Light & Water Show, a mesmerizing fusion of lights, water, and music dancing in perfect harmony. With seamless pick-up and drop-off, Travelxploria curates an unforgettable evening where every moment is designed for wonder and comfort. This is just the beginning of your incredible Singapore journey.

Start your day with a seamless pick-up by our Travelxploria representative, ensuring a smooth and comfortable journey. Accompanied by our experienced Travelxploria tour guide, dive into the rich Peranakan heritage at the Peranakan Museum, where colorful traditions and exquisite craftsmanship come to life. Afterward, our guide leads you to Chinatown, a lively district brimming with heritage, from intricate temples to bustling street markets. Stroll through the vibrant alleys, sampling traditional delicacies and soaking in the lively atmosphere. Throughout the experience, our best on-ground support staff ensures every detail is taken care of, allowing you to fully embrace the journey. After a culture-filled day, relax as we provide a seamless drop-off back to your hotel, leaving you with lasting impressions of Singapore’s rich history and traditions.

Begin your day with a captivating Melaka River Cruise, where our Travelxploria representative ensures a seamless pick-up and comfortable transfer. Glide along the historic river as our experienced Travelxploria tour guide brings Malacca’s colonial past to life, pointing out beautifully preserved Dutch, Portuguese, and British-era buildings along the way. Feel the vibrant energy of the riverside neighborhoods, filled with colorful murals and bustling cafés.

After the cruise, step back in time with visits to A Famosa, the remains of a 16th-century Portuguese fortress, and St. Paul’s Hill, offering panoramic city views from its ancient church ruins. Throughout the day, our best on-ground support staff ensures a smooth and enriching experience, allowing you to soak in Malacca’s rich heritage without a worry. With Travelxploria handling all the details, all you have to do is immerse yourself in the magic of this historic city.

Embark on an unforgettable Half Day City Tour of Kuala Lumpur with Travelxploria’s expert representatives ensuring a seamless experience from start to finish. Our experienced tour guide will take you on a journey through the city’s rich cultural heritage and modern marvels, making every stop insightful and engaging. Capture stunning photos at the Petronas Twin Towers, King's Palace, National Monument, and the National Mosque, while learning fascinating stories behind these landmarks. Visit the Cocoa Centre, where you can explore Malaysia’s renowned chocolate industry and sample delicious treats. Our tour also takes you to the historic Independence Square, a symbol of Malaysia’s journey to freedom, where you can immerse yourself in the city's vibrant energy. With Travelxploria’s best on-ground support staff, seamless pick-up and drop-off services, and a carefully curated itinerary, this tour guarantees a hassle-free and enriching experience in Malaysia’s dynamic capital.

After a hearty breakfast, set off on a picturesque drive from Kuala Lumpur to Cameron Highlands, guided by our experienced Travelxploria tour guide and supported by our best on-ground staff for a seamless travel experience. En route, stop at the iconic Batu Caves, where the towering golden statue of Lord Murugan stands as a gateway to the sacred limestone caves. Explore the vibrant Hindu temple within and marvel at the intricate cave formations before continuing your journey.

As the road winds through lush greenery, feel the air turn refreshingly cool, a welcome change from the city heat. Take in the breathtaking landscapes of rolling tea plantations, misty hills, and scenic valleys before arriving at your hotel in Cameron Highlands. Whether you choose to relax or take a leisurely evening stroll, our Travelxploria representative is always available to ensure your comfort and convenience throughout the journey.

1.jpeg\"}]"}]}}]},{"day_title":"Cameron Highlands","day_summary":"

Wake up to the crisp mountain air and get ready for a day of immersive exploration in Cameron Highlands, led by our experienced Travelxploria tour guide and supported by our best on-ground staff. Begin your journey at the lush tea plantations, where rolling green hills stretch as far as the eye can see. Learn about the intricate tea-making process while enjoying a freshly brewed cup with stunning panoramic views.

Next, head to a strawberry farm, where you can handpick fresh, juicy strawberries straight from the vines—a delightful experience for all ages. Continue your adventure into the mystical Mossy Forest, a cloud-kissed wonderland filled with rare flora, moss-covered trees, and fresh, invigorating air.

Throughout the day, our Travelxploria representative ensures seamless pick-up and drop-off, providing comfort and convenience as you soak in the serene beauty of Cameron Highlands.

Bid farewell to the refreshing highlands as our Travelxploria representative and experienced tour guide escort you on a scenic drive from Cameron Highlands to Penang. Sit back and enjoy the changing landscapes—from misty hilltops to the bustling coastal charm of Malaysia’s \"Pearl of the Orient.\"

Upon arrival in Penang, our best on-ground support staff ensures a smooth hotel check-in, allowing you to unwind before stepping out to explore the vibrant streets. Take a leisurely evening walk along Gurney Drive, famous for its stunning sea views and lively food scene. Savor local delicacies like Penang Char Kway Teow and Assam Laksa, indulging in the island’s rich culinary heritage.

Whether you choose to relax by the shore or explore the buzzing city streets, Travelxploria ensures a seamless and memorable experience from start to finish.
