Tour","day_summary":"

Start your day with an immersive Penang city tour, guided by our experienced Travelxploria tour guide, who will take you through the rich heritage of this UNESCO-listed gem. Wander through the charming streets of George Town, where colonial architecture meets vibrant street art. Discover the grandeur of Khoo Kongsi, an intricate Chinese clan house showcasing elaborate carvings and centuries of history. Step into the Pinang Peranakan Mansion, a beautifully restored heritage home that offers a glimpse into the lavish lifestyle of the Peranakan community.

In the afternoon, let our best on-ground support staff seamlessly lead you to Little India, where the air is filled with the aroma of spices and the sounds of Bollywood music. Stroll past colorful shops, indulge in authentic Indian cuisine, and soak in the cultural vibrancy of this lively district. With Travelxploria’s expert guidance, your Penang experience is nothing short of extraordinary.

Board a short flight from Penang to Langkawi, where our representative from Travelxploria will warmly welcome you upon arrival. Enjoy a smooth transfer to your luxurious hotel, ensuring a seamless and comfortable check-in experience.

With the guidance of our experienced Travelxploria tour guide, embark on a journey to explore Langkawi’s stunning coastline, pristine beaches, and crystal-clear waters. Whether you choose to unwind by the shore, take a dip in the turquoise sea, or indulge in thrilling water activities like jet skiing and parasailing, Langkawi offers something for everyone.

Our best on-ground support staff is always at your service, ensuring a hassle-free experience as you soak in the island’s breathtaking beauty. As the sun sets, take a peaceful stroll along the beach or enjoy a delicious seafood dinner by the sea, making your first day in Langkawi truly unforgettable.

Resort 3.jpg\"}]"}]}}]},{"day_title":"Langkawi – Free at Leisure","day_summary":"

Wake up to the serene beauty of Langkawi, where a day of adventure or relaxation awaits. Our representative from Travelxploria will be on hand to assist you, ensuring a smooth and personalized experience.

With guidance from our experienced Travelxploria tour guide, set off to explore the island’s natural wonders. Take in the breathtaking views from the Langkawi Sky Bridge, a marvel suspended high above the rainforest, or unwind on the pristine beaches with the soothing sound of waves.

For those seeking more excitement, our best on-ground support staff can arrange an exhilarating island-hopping tour, taking you to hidden coves and stunning lagoons. Alternatively, visit the Langkawi Wildlife Park, where you can interact with exotic animals.

Spend your day at your own pace, whether it’s basking in nature’s beauty or indulging in thrilling activities, all while enjoying the seamless service of Travelxploria.

","day_element":[]},{"day_title":"Langkawi – Free at Leisure","day_summary":"

Enjoy another carefree day in Langkawi, where you can explore or simply relax at your leisure. Our representative from Travelxploria will be available to assist you, ensuring a hassle-free experience throughout the day.

For nature lovers, embark on a scenic boat trip to Kilim Karst Geoforest Park, where our experienced Travelxploria tour guide will introduce you to the stunning mangroves, limestone formations, and diverse wildlife of this UNESCO-listed site. Spot eagles soaring above and explore hidden caves, all while soaking in the breathtaking surroundings.

If relaxation is your priority, our best on-ground support staff can arrange a perfect beach day for you—whether it’s lounging on Pantai Cenang with a refreshing drink or indulging in a rejuvenating spa session.

No matter how you choose to spend your day, Travelxploria ensures a seamless, comfortable, and unforgettable experience in Langkawi’s tropical paradise.

","day_element":[]},{"day_title":"Langkawi Departure","day_summary":"

After a delightful breakfast, take some time for last-minute shopping at local markets or enjoy a peaceful stroll along Langkawi’s pristine beaches, soaking in the final moments of this tropical paradise.

Our representative from Travelxploria will ensure a seamless and stress-free transfer to Langkawi Airport. Whether you need assistance with luggage or recommendations for souvenirs, our best on-ground support staff is always ready to help.

With the guidance of our experienced Travelxploria tour guide, every part of your journey has been thoughtfully curated, leaving you with unforgettable memories of Singapore and Malaysia. As you board your flight, take with you the warmth of this incredible experience and the promise of more adventures to come with Travelxploria! Safe travels.

packages.overview:
• Arrival & Night Safari – Arrive in Singapore, check in, and experience the famous Night Safari.
  • Singapore City Tour & Gardens by the Bay – Explore Merlion Park, Chinatown, Marina Bay Sands, and visit Gardens by the Bay.
  • Universal Studios Adventure – Enjoy a fun-filled day at Universal Studios Singapore with thrilling rides and attractions.
  • Transfer to Kuala Lumpur & City Tour – Travel to Kuala Lumpur and explore Petronas Twin Towers, Merdeka Square, and Bukit Bintang.
  • Sunway Lagoon Theme Park – Experience water rides, amusement parks, and adventure zones at Sunway Lagoon.
  • Genting Highlands & Batu Caves – Visit the hill resort of Genting Highlands and explore the iconic Batu Caves.
  • Departure from Kuala Lumpur – Enjoy a relaxed morning before transferring to the airport for departure.

After checking in and Get ready for an unforgettable evening as our Travelxploria guide welcomes you with a convenient pick-up from your hotel. Experience the magic of the world’s first nocturnal zoo, the Night Safari, home to over 2,500 animals. Glide through the wilderness on a guided tram ride, passing through diverse habitats under the moonlit sky. Stroll along scenic walking trails for up-close encounters with creatures like tigers, flying squirrels, and more. After your thrilling night of exploration, we ensure a comfortable drop-off back to your hotel.​

Kickstart your Singapore adventure with Travelxploria! Our friendly representative will pick you up from your hotel in a comfortable, air-conditioned vehicle for an exciting half-day city tour. Led by our expert guide, explore the city's top landmarks, including the iconic Merlion Park, the stunning Marina Bay Sands, and the vibrant streets of Little India and Chinatown. Capture breathtaking views at Gardens by the Bay and drive past the historic Padang and Parliament House. Immerse yourself in Singapore’s culture, history, and modern marvels. After an enriching tour, relax as we drop you back at your hotel, ensuring a seamless experience.

Begin your day with a delicious breakfast, followed by a comfortable pick-up from your hotel with our Travelxploria guide. Explore the iconic Gardens by the Bay, a futuristic oasis blending nature and technology. Wander through the breathtaking Supertree Grove, marveling at the towering vertical gardens. Step into the climate-controlled wonders of the Flower Dome, showcasing global flora, and the mystical Cloud Forest, with its spectacular indoor waterfall. After an unforgettable experience, we’ll ensure a smooth drop-off back to your hotel.

Our experienced tour guide will take you on a journey through the city’s rich cultural heritage and modern marvels, making every stop insightful and engaging. Capture stunning photos at the Petronas Twin Towers, King's Palace, National Monument, and the National Mosque, while learning fascinating stories behind these landmarks. Visit the Cocoa Centre, where you can explore Malaysia’s renowned chocolate industry and sample delicious treats. Our tour also takes you to the historic Independence Square, a symbol of Malaysia’s journey to freedom, where you can immerse yourself in the city's vibrant energy. With Travelxploria’s best on-ground support staff, seamless pick-up and drop-off services, and a carefully curated itinerary, this tour guarantees a hassle-free and enriching experience in Malaysia’s dynamic capital.

Get ready for a day filled with thrills and excitement as Travelxploria takes you to Sunway Lagoon, Kuala Lumpur’s premier theme park destination! Your adventure begins with a comfortable hotel pick-up in a private, air-conditioned vehicle, accompanied by our friendly representative. Upon arrival, our expert guide will assist you in exploring six exhilarating parks—from the Water Park’s giant wave pool to the Amusement Park’s thrilling rides, the Wildlife Park’s exotic animals, and the Scream Park’s spooky adventures. For adrenaline lovers, the Extreme Park offers exciting activities like bungee jumping and go-karting. Cool off on exciting water slides, float along the lazy river, or relax on the sandy beach. Capture fun-filled memories with family and friends as you indulge in non-stop entertainment. After an action-packed day, unwind as we drop you back at your hotel, ensuring a smooth and comfortable journey back. Sunway Lagoon guarantees an unforgettable experience.

Get ready for an exhilarating journey to Genting Highlands, where Travelxploria’s representative ensures a seamless pick-up from your hotel. As you ascend the cool, misty mountains, our experienced tour guide shares fascinating insights into this vibrant hill resort. Feel the thrill as you board the one-way cable car, gliding over lush rainforests with breathtaking panoramic views. Once at the top, immerse yourself in the excitement of the casinos, theme parks, and world-class shopping experiences. Whether you seek adventure or relaxation, Travelxploria’s best on-ground support staff is always ready to assist, ensuring a hassle-free experience. On your way back, make a brief stop at the sacred Batu Caves, where you can climb the 272 steps to witness the awe-inspiring golden statue of Lord Murugan. With seamless transfers and a perfectly curated itinerary, this day trip guarantees a magical blend of nature, culture, and entertainment.

Embark on a fascinating journey to the Batu Caves with Travelxploria! Our friendly representative will pick you up from your hotel in a comfortable vehicle, ensuring a smooth start to your adventure. Accompanied by an expert guide, explore this iconic Hindu pilgrimage site, home to the majestic 272 rainbow-colored steps leading to limestone caves filled with ancient temples and shrines. Marvel at the towering golden statue of Lord Murugan, witness intricate cave formations, and experience the spiritual aura of the site. After capturing unforgettable moments, relax as we drop you back at your hotel, ensuring a seamless and enriching experience!

packages.overview:
• Arrival in Singapore | Safari Tour or Bird Paradise
    Arrive in Singapore and visit either the Safari Tour with a tram ride or Bird Paradise for a wildlife experience.
  • Thrilling Universal Studios Adventure
    Spend a fun-filled day at Universal Studios Singapore, enjoying exciting rides and shows.
  • Sentosa Island Exploration
    Visit Sentosa Island with a cable car ride, Madame Tussauds, S.E.A. Aquarium & the Wings of Time show.
  • Singapore City Tour
    Explore top Singapore landmarks, including Marina Bay Sands, Merlion Park, and Gardens by the Bay.
  • Transfer to Kuala Lumpur
    Travel from Singapore to Kuala Lumpur and enjoy leisure time in the city.
  • Kuala Lumpur City Highlights
    Discover the Petronas Twin Towers, Merdeka Square, and vibrant local markets.
  • Batu Caves & Genting Highlands
    Visit Batu Caves and take a scenic cable car ride to Genting Highlands for entertainment and relaxation.
  • Departure from Kuala Lumpur
    Return to Kuala Lumpur, enjoy last-minute shopping, and depart with wonderful memories.

Arrive in Singapore and get ready for an unforgettable evening as our Travelxploria guide welcomes you with a convenient pick-up from your hotel. Experience the magic of the world’s first nocturnal zoo, the Night Safari, home to over 2,500 animals. Glide through the wilderness on a guided tram ride, passing through diverse habitats under the moonlit sky. Stroll along scenic walking trails for up-close encounters with creatures like tigers, flying squirrels, and more. After your thrilling night of exploration, we ensure a comfortable drop-off back to your hotel.​

Or

Join Travelxploria for an enchanting journey to Bird Paradise Singapore, where nature comes alive! Our courteous representative will pick you up from your hotel in a comfortable, air-conditioned vehicle. Led by our expert guide, explore this breathtaking aviary teeming with thousands of exotic birds. Witness the vibrant macaws, graceful flamingos, and mighty eagles in beautifully crafted habitats. Engage in interactive feeding sessions and be amazed by spectacular bird shows. After a day filled with nature’s melodies and stunning sights, sit back and unwind as we drop you safely back at your hotel, ensuring a smooth and memorable experience.

Visitors can enjoy exciting rides like Transformers: The Ride and Battlestar Galactica, immersive 4D shows, live entertainment, and meet iconic movie characters. Enjoy the convenience of hotel pickup and drop-off, along with a knowledgeable Travelxploria guide to ensure a smooth and memorable experience throughout your visit.​

Start your day with a delightful breakfast before embarking on an exciting visit to Madame Tussauds Singapore with Travelxploria. Our friendly representative will pick you up from your hotel in a comfortable, air-conditioned vehicle. Accompanied by our expert guide, step into the world of fame and get up close with life-like wax figures of global celebrities, sports icons, and historical legends. Enjoy interactive experiences like the Spirit of Singapore boat ride and the Marvel Universe 4D adventure. Capture unforgettable moments with your favorite stars! After a fun-filled day, relax as we drop you back at your hotel for a seamless experience.​

After a delightful breakfast, a friendly Travelxploria representative will pick you up from your hotel. Embark on an unforgettable journey to the S.E.A. Aquarium on Sentosa, one of the world’s largest aquariums, housing over 100,000 marine animals across 45 habitats. Explore the mesmerizing marine life and, during the holiday season, enjoy the festive Splashtacular Christmas with thrilling waterslides and a relaxing lazy river experience. After a day of adventure, enjoy a comfortable drop-off back to your hotel.

After a delightful breakfast, a Travelxploria representative will pick you up from your hotel and guide you to the captivating Wings of Time show. Following your exploration of the ocean depths at S.E.A. Aquarium, get ready for a stunning seaside performance filled with lasers, pyrotechnics, water fountains, and 3D mapping. The show weaves an epic tale of a mythical bird and its companions, traveling through time across mesmerizing landscapes. After this unforgettable experience, you’ll be comfortably dropped off at your hotel to end your day seamlessly.

Embark on an unforgettable Half Day City Tour of Kuala Lumpur with Travelxploria’s expert representatives ensuring a seamless experience from start to finish. Our experienced tour guide will take you on a journey through the city’s rich cultural heritage and modern marvels, making every stop insightful and engaging. Capture stunning photos at the Petronas Twin Towers, King's Palace, National Monument, and the National Mosque, while learning fascinating stories behind these landmarks. Visit the Cocoa Centre, where you can explore Malaysia’s renowned chocolate industry and sample delicious treats. Our tour also takes you to the historic Independence Square, a symbol of Malaysia’s journey to freedom, where you can immerse yourself in the city's vibrant energy. With Travelxploria’s best on-ground support staff, seamless pick-up and drop-off services, and a carefully curated itinerary, this tour guarantees a hassle-free and enriching experience in Malaysia’s dynamic capital.

Get ready for an exhilarating journey to Genting Highlands, where Travelxploria’s representative ensures a seamless pick-up from your hotel. As you ascend the cool, misty mountains, our experienced tour guide shares fascinating insights into this vibrant hill resort. Feel the thrill as you board the two-way cable car, gliding over lush rainforests with breathtaking panoramic views. Once at the top, immerse yourself in the excitement of the casinos, theme parks, and world-class shopping experiences. Whether you seek adventure or relaxation, Travelxploria’s best on-ground support staff is always ready to assist, ensuring a hassle-free experience. On your way back, make a brief stop at the sacred Batu Caves, where you can climb the 272 steps to witness the awe-inspiring golden statue of Lord Murugan. With seamless transfers and a perfectly curated itinerary, this day trip guarantees a magical blend of nature, culture, and entertainment.

Embark on a fascinating journey to the Batu Caves with Travelxploria! Our friendly representative will pick you up from your hotel in a comfortable vehicle, ensuring a smooth start to your adventure. Accompanied by an expert guide, explore this iconic Hindu pilgrimage site, home to the majestic 272 rainbow-colored steps leading to limestone caves filled with ancient temples and shrines. Marvel at the towering golden statue of Lord Murugan, witness intricate cave formations, and experience the spiritual aura of the site. After capturing unforgettable moments, relax as we drop you back at your hotel, ensuring a seamless and enriching experience!

packages.overview: Embark on an unforgettable journey with Travelxploria, beginning in dazzling Singapore where you’ll stroll through Marina Bay’s waterfront and wander the futuristic Gardens by the Bay. Feel the adrenaline rush at Universal Studios before returning to marvel at the Supertree Grove’s nightly light show. After a scenic city tour, board your luxury cruise for a day of laid-back onboard entertainment, then wake up to the sights of Kuala Lumpur—Tour the city’s landmarks, breathe in the cool mountain air at Genting Highlands, and explore the sacred Batu Caves and bustling local markets. Finally, Travelxploria wraps up your adventure with a seamless transfer and heartfelt farewell, leaving you with cherished memories of two vibrant countries.

Get ready for an exhilarating journey to Genting Highlands, where Travelxploria’s representative ensures a seamless pick-up from your hotel. As you ascend the cool, misty mountains, our experienced tour guide shares fascinating insights into this vibrant hill resort. Feel the thrill as you board the one-way cable car, gliding over lush rainforests with breathtaking panoramic views. Once at the top, immerse yourself in the excitement of the casinos, theme parks, and world-class shopping experiences. Whether you seek adventure or relaxation, Travelxploria’s best on-ground support staff is always ready to assist, ensuring a hassle-free experience. On your way back, make a brief stop at the sacred Batu Caves, where you can climb the 272 steps to witness the awe-inspiring golden statue of Lord Murugan. With seamless transfers and a perfectly curated itinerary, this day trip guarantees a magical blend of nature, culture, and entertainment.

Embark on a fascinating journey to the Batu Caves with Travelxploria! Our friendly representative will pick you up from your hotel in a comfortable vehicle, ensuring a smooth start to your adventure. Accompanied by an expert guide, explore this iconic Hindu pilgrimage site, home to the majestic 272 rainbow-colored steps leading to limestone caves filled with ancient temples and shrines. Marvel at the towering golden statue of Lord Murugan, witness intricate cave formations, and experience the spiritual aura of the site. After capturing unforgettable moments, relax as we drop you back at your hotel, ensuring a seamless and enriching experience!

packages.package_name: Singapore and Malaysia Heritage Discovery Tour
packages.overview: Discover the best of Singapore and Malaysia with Travelxploria on an unforgettable journey blending modern marvels and rich heritage. Arrive in vibrant Singapore and enjoy a relaxing start, followed by a city tour exploring Chinatown, Little India, and panoramic views from the Singapore Flyer. Marvel at the futuristic beauty of Gardens by the Bay and Marina Bay Sands before flying to Kuala Lumpur and transferring to the historic town of Malacca. Wander through Malacca’s UNESCO-listed landmarks and enjoy a charming river cruise. Continue to Kuala Lumpur to witness the iconic Petronas Twin Towers and the spiritual beauty of Batu Caves. With a perfect mix of sightseeing, cultural immersion, and leisure, Travelxploria ensures a seamless and memorable escape across two incredible countries.

Begin your immersive cultural journey with a warm welcome from our Travelxploria representative, ensuring a seamless start to your day. Accompanied by our experienced Travelxploria tour guide, step into the vibrant streets of Chinatown, where heritage meets modern charm. Explore traditional shops, admire intricate architecture, and visit the sacred Buddha Tooth Relic Temple, a site of spiritual significance. Indulge in authentic local flavors before heading to Little India, where a burst of colors and exotic aromas transport you to a different world. Here, visit the historic Sri Veeramakaliamman Temple, a masterpiece of devotion and artistry. Finally, wander through Kampong Glam, the heart of Malay-Arab culture, where the majestic Sultan Mosque stands in grandeur. Shop for unique souvenirs in the lively alleys as our best on-ground support staff ensures a hassle-free experience with seamless pick-up and drop-off. With Travelxploria, every step is enriched with history, culture, and comfort.

Embark on a luxurious journey with Travelxploria's exclusive Singapore Flyer experience. Standing at 165 meters, the Singapore Flyer is one of the world’s largest observation wheels, offering stunning panoramic views of Singapore's skyline, along with glimpses of Malaysia and Indonesia. Your private capsule ride is complemented by a glass of champagne, elevating the experience as you take in the breathtaking urban architecture and cosmopolitan landscape. Enjoy a delectable gourmet breakfast served within your capsule, featuring a selection of fresh, delightful delicacies to start your day. Throughout your journey, a professional guide from Travelxploria will accompany you, providing fascinating insights into Singapore's iconic landmarks. With hotel pick-up and drop-off included, this seamless, indulgent experience is the perfect way to begin your day in Singapore.

Start your day with a delightful breakfast before our Travelxploria guide greets you for a convenient pick-up from your hotel. Explore Singapore’s rich heritage at the iconic National Museum of Singapore, where interactive exhibits and cultural artifacts bring history to life. Immerse yourself in captivating stories, from Singapore’s early beginnings to its vibrant modern identity. Our expert guide will ensure you experience every highlight of this cultural gem. After a day of discovery, enjoy a comfortable drop-off back to your hotel.​

Begin your day with a delicious breakfast, followed by a comfortable pick-up from your hotel with our Travelxploria guide. Explore the iconic Gardens by the Bay, a futuristic oasis blending nature and technology. Wander through the breathtaking Supertree Grove, marveling at the towering vertical gardens. Step into the climate-controlled wonders of the Flower Dome, showcasing global flora, and the mystical Cloud Forest, with its spectacular indoor waterfall. After an unforgettable experience, we’ll ensure a smooth drop-off back to your hotel.

Your Singapore adventure begins with a warm welcome from our Travelxploria representative, ensuring a seamless check-in and comfortable start to your journey. As the sun sets, our experienced Travelxploria tour guide leads you to the stunning Marina Bay, Singapore’s most iconic waterfront. Marvel at the legendary Merlion statue, capturing picture-perfect moments against the shimmering skyline. Stroll along the breathtaking Marina Bay Sands SkyPark, where panoramic city views leave you in awe. Our best on-ground support staff ensures a smooth and delightful experience as you soak in the lively atmosphere. As night falls, witness the Spectra Light & Water Show, a mesmerizing fusion of lights, water, and music dancing in perfect harmony. With seamless pick-up and drop-off, Travelxploria curates an unforgettable evening where every moment is designed for wonder and comfort. This is just the beginning of your incredible Singapore journey.

Embark on an unforgettable Half Day City Tour of Kuala Lumpur with Travelxploria’s expert representatives ensuring a seamless experience from start to finish. Our experienced tour guide will take you on a journey through the city’s rich cultural heritage and modern marvels, making every stop insightful and engaging. Capture stunning photos at the Petronas Twin Towers, King's Palace, National Monument, and the National Mosque, while learning fascinating stories behind these landmarks. Visit the Cocoa Centre, where you can explore Malaysia’s renowned chocolate industry and sample delicious treats. Our tour also takes you to the historic Independence Square, a symbol of Malaysia’s journey to freedom, where you can immerse yourself in the city's vibrant energy. With Travelxploria’s best on-ground support staff, seamless pick-up and drop-off services, and a carefully curated itinerary, this tour guarantees a hassle-free and enriching experience in Malaysia’s dynamic capital.

Embark on a fascinating journey to the Batu Caves with Travelxploria! Our friendly representative will pick you up from your hotel in a comfortable vehicle, ensuring a smooth start to your adventure. Accompanied by an expert guide, explore this iconic Hindu pilgrimage site, home to the majestic 272 rainbow-colored steps leading to limestone caves filled with ancient temples and shrines. Marvel at the towering golden statue of Lord Murugan, witness intricate cave formations, and experience the spiritual aura of the site. After capturing unforgettable moments, relax as we drop you back at your hotel, ensuring a seamless and enriching experience!

packages.package_name: Singapore and Malaysia A Tale of Two Cities and Timeless Traditions
packages.overview:
• Arrival in Singapore – Transfer to hotel, explore Marina Bay Sands & Merlion Park.
  • City Tour & Singapore Flyer – Visit Chinatown, Little India, Merlion Park & enjoy Singapore Flyer views.
  • Gardens by the Bay & Marina Bay Sands – Explore Gardens by the Bay, National Museum & Marina Bay Sands SkyPark.
  • Fly to Kuala Lumpur – Transfer to Malacca – Explore A Famosa, Jonker Street & historic Malacca.
  • Malacca Tour – Visit Sultanate Palace, Cheng Hoon Teng Temple & enjoy a river cruise.
  • Kuala Lumpur Exploration – Visit Petronas Twin Towers, KLCC Park & Bukit Bintang.
  • City Tour & Batu Caves – Explore Merdeka Square, National Mosque & Batu Caves.
  • Cameron Highlands – Visit tea plantations, Mossy Forest & Strawberry Farms.
  • Cameron Highlands Tour – Explore Butterfly Garden, Lavender Garden & Sam Poh Temple.
  • Transfer to Penang – Georgetown Heritage Tour – Discover colonial sites & street art.
  • Penang Sightseeing – Visit Penang Hill, Kek Lok Si Temple & relax at Gurney Drive.
  • Departure – Free time before airport transfer.

Begin your immersive cultural journey with a warm welcome from our Travelxploria representative, ensuring a seamless start to your day. Accompanied by our experienced Travelxploria tour guide, step into the vibrant streets of Chinatown, where heritage meets modern charm. Explore traditional shops, admire intricate architecture, and visit the sacred Buddha Tooth Relic Temple, a site of spiritual significance. Indulge in authentic local flavors before heading to Little India, where a burst of colors and exotic aromas transport you to a different world. Here, visit the historic Sri Veeramakaliamman Temple, a masterpiece of devotion and artistry. Finally, wander through Kampong Glam, the heart of Malay-Arab culture, where the majestic Sultan Mosque stands in grandeur. Shop for unique souvenirs in the lively alleys as our best on-ground support staff ensures a hassle-free experience with seamless pick-up and drop-off. With Travelxploria, every step is enriched with history, culture, and comfort.

Embark on a luxurious journey with Travelxploria's exclusive Singapore Flyer experience. Standing at 165 meters, the Singapore Flyer is one of the world’s largest observation wheels, offering stunning panoramic views of Singapore's skyline, along with glimpses of Malaysia and Indonesia. Your private capsule ride is complemented by a glass of champagne, elevating the experience as you take in the breathtaking urban architecture and cosmopolitan landscape. Enjoy a delectable gourmet breakfast served within your capsule, featuring a selection of fresh, delightful delicacies to start your day. Throughout your journey, a professional guide from Travelxploria will accompany you, providing fascinating insights into Singapore's iconic landmarks. With hotel pick-up and drop-off included, this seamless, indulgent experience is the perfect way to begin your day in Singapore.

Begin your day with a delicious breakfast, followed by a comfortable pick-up from your hotel with our Travelxploria guide. Explore the iconic Gardens by the Bay, a futuristic oasis blending nature and technology. Wander through the breathtaking Supertree Grove, marveling at the towering vertical gardens. Step into the climate-controlled wonders of the Flower Dome, showcasing global flora, and the mystical Cloud Forest, with its spectacular indoor waterfall. After an unforgettable experience, we’ll ensure a smooth drop-off back to your hotel.

Start your day with a guided tour led by our experienced tour guide from Travelxploria, beginning at the Malacca Sultanate Palace, a fascinating replica of the ancient royal residence. Dive into the rich royal history of the region before heading to Cheng Hoon Teng Temple, Malaysia’s oldest Chinese temple, where our guide will share intriguing insights into its spiritual significance. Next, explore the Baba & Nyonya Heritage Museum, where you’ll gain a deeper understanding of Peranakan culture.

Continue your journey to the Stadthuys, an iconic Dutch colonial building, and admire the vibrant Christ Church. As evening approaches, our best on-ground support staff from Travelxploria will ensure a seamless experience as you board a Malacca River Cruise. Drift along the river, soaking in picturesque views of illuminated historical buildings and charming bridges. Travelxploria guarantees a hassle-free, enriching experience. Overnight stay in Malacca.

Embark on an unforgettable Half Day City Tour of Kuala Lumpur with Travelxploria’s expert representatives ensuring a seamless experience from start to finish. Our experienced tour guide will take you on a journey through the city’s rich cultural heritage and modern marvels, making every stop insightful and engaging. Capture stunning photos at the Petronas Twin Towers, King's Palace, National Monument, and the National Mosque, while learning fascinating stories behind these landmarks. Visit the Cocoa Centre, where you can explore Malaysia’s renowned chocolate industry and sample delicious treats. Our tour also takes you to the historic Independence Square, a symbol of Malaysia’s journey to freedom, where you can immerse yourself in the city's vibrant energy. With Travelxploria’s best on-ground support staff, seamless pick-up and drop-off services, and a carefully curated itinerary, this tour guarantees a hassle-free and enriching experience in Malaysia’s dynamic capital.

Embark on a fascinating journey to the Batu Caves with Travelxploria! Our friendly representative will pick you up from your hotel in a comfortable vehicle, ensuring a smooth start to your adventure. Accompanied by an expert guide, explore this iconic Hindu pilgrimage site, home to the majestic 272 rainbow-colored steps leading to limestone caves filled with ancient temples and shrines. Marvel at the towering golden statue of Lord Murugan, witness intricate cave formations, and experience the spiritual aura of the site. After capturing unforgettable moments, relax as we drop you back at your hotel, ensuring a seamless and enriching experience!

After a delightful breakfast, our representative from Travelxploria will ensure a seamless transfer as you embark on a scenic drive to Cameron Highlands, a serene hill station known for its cool climate and lush tea plantations. Enjoy a comfortable journey in a private vehicle with insights from our experienced tour guide from Travelxploria.

As the day winds down, unwind at your cozy hotel, or take a leisurely stroll through Cameron Lavender Garden, admiring vibrant blooms in the cool mountain air. After a refreshing breakfast, embark on a delightful journey through Cameron Highlands with our representative from Travelxploria, ensuring a seamless experience. Start your day at the Butterfly Garden, where vibrant butterflies flutter around lush greenery. Next, take a scenic stroll through Cameron Lavender Garden, where the sight and aroma of blooming lavender create a picture-perfect setting.

Continue your exploration at the Rose Garden, home to a stunning variety of roses in different hues. As evening approaches, unwind with a delicious dinner at a local restaurant, indulging in fresh local produce from the highlands. Throughout the day, our best on-ground support staff from Travelxploria will ensure a hassle-free and memorable experience. Overnight stay in Cameron Highlands.

After a delightful breakfast, check out from your hotel and embark on a scenic drive to Penang with seamless transfers arranged by our representative from Travelxploria. Sit back and enjoy the journey as our best on-ground support staff ensures a comfortable ride.

Upon arrival in George Town, the vibrant capital of Penang, get ready to explore its UNESCO World Heritage-listed streets. With our experienced tour guide from Travelxploria, stroll through colonial-era buildings, admire striking street art, and immerse yourself in the city's cultural charm. Start your day with a seamless transfer arranged by our representative from Travelxploria, ensuring a hassle-free journey to Penang Hill. With the guidance of our experienced tour guide from Travelxploria, take in breathtaking panoramic views of the island and the stunning cityscape below.

Next, visit the majestic Kek Lok Si Temple, one of Southeast Asia’s largest Buddhist temples, adorned with stunning architecture and spiritual significance. Continue to the Penang Peranakan Mansion, where our guide will immerse you in the rich Peranakan culture, showcasing antique furniture, traditional clothing, and unique customs.

Explore the Penang State Museum, where history comes to life through fascinating exhibits. As the sun sets, head to Gurney Drive, a lively seafront promenade offering an array of local and international cuisines. Our best on-ground support staff ensures a smooth and comfortable experience throughout the day. Overnight stay in Penang.

Bid farewell to the vibrant culture, breathtaking landscapes, and unforgettable experiences of Singapore and Malaysia. Leave with cherished memories and the promise of future adventures. packages.package_name: Singapore and Malaysia Twin City Adventure Tour
packages.overview:
• Arrival in Singapore – Check-in and explore Marina Bay Sands or Gardens by the Bay.
  • Singapore City Tour & Flyer Experience – Visit Merlion Park, Chinatown, Little India & enjoy panoramic views from the Singapore Flyer.
  • Sentosa Island Excursion – Explore S.E.A. Aquarium, Madame Tussauds & relax at Sentosa’s beaches.
  • Transfer to Kuala Lumpur & Leisure – Travel to KL, visit Petronas Twin Towers & enjoy street food at Jalan Alor.
  • Sunway Lagoon Adventure – Thrill-packed day at Sunway Lagoon Theme Park.
  • Genting Highlands Getaway – Explore Chin Swee Temple, Genting SkyWorlds & shopping at Premium Outlets.
  • Departure from Kuala Lumpur – Last-minute shopping or sightseeing before your flight home.

Begin your day with a guided city tour, led by a Travelxploria representative, to explore Singapore's iconic landmarks like the Singapore Flyer, the Civic District, and the Padang. After soaking in the sights, head to Chinatown, where you'll experience the vibrant cultural heart of Singapore, with opportunities to shop for souvenirs and visit the serene Buddha Tooth Relic Temple. Along the way, enjoy a delicious breakfast, carefully selected to energize you for the day ahead. Your Travelxploria guide will ensure you make the most of each stop, sharing insights into Singapore's rich history and traditions. The experience includes hotel pick-up and drop-off, providing a seamless, hassle-free journey throughout your tour.

Embark on a luxurious journey with Travelxploria's exclusive Singapore Flyer experience. Standing at 165 meters, the Singapore Flyer is one of the world’s largest observation wheels, offering stunning panoramic views of Singapore's skyline, along with glimpses of Malaysia and Indonesia. Your private capsule ride is complemented by a glass of champagne, elevating the experience as you take in the breathtaking urban architecture and cosmopolitan landscape. Enjoy a delectable gourmet breakfast served within your capsule, featuring a selection of fresh, delightful delicacies to start your day. Throughout your journey, a professional guide from Travelxploria will accompany you, providing fascinating insights into Singapore's iconic landmarks. With hotel pick-up and drop-off included, this seamless, indulgent experience is the perfect way to begin your day in Singapore.

After a delightful breakfast, a friendly Travelxploria representative will pick you up from your hotel. Embark on an unforgettable journey to the S.E.A. Aquarium on Sentosa, one of the world’s largest aquariums, housing over 100,000 marine animals across 45 habitats. Explore the mesmerizing marine life and, during the holiday season, enjoy the festive Splashtacular Christmas with thrilling waterslides and a relaxing lazy river experience. After a day of adventure, enjoy a comfortable drop-off back to your hotel.

Start your day with a delightful breakfast before embarking on an exciting visit to Madame Tussauds Singapore with Travelxploria. Our friendly representative will pick you up from your hotel in a comfortable, air-conditioned vehicle. Accompanied by our expert guide, step into the world of fame and get up close with life-like wax figures of global celebrities, sports icons, and historical legends. Enjoy interactive experiences like the Spirit of Singapore boat ride and the Marvel Universe 4D adventure. Capture unforgettable moments with your favorite stars! After a fun-filled day, relax as we drop you back at your hotel for a seamless experience.​

Get ready for a day filled with thrills and excitement as Travelxploria takes you to Sunway Lagoon, Kuala Lumpur’s premier theme park destination! Your adventure begins with a comfortable hotel pick-up in a private, air-conditioned vehicle, accompanied by our friendly representative. Upon arrival, our expert guide will assist you in exploring six exhilarating parks—from the Water Park’s giant wave pool to the Amusement Park’s thrilling rides, the Wildlife Park’s exotic animals, and the Scream Park’s spooky adventures. For adrenaline lovers, the Extreme Park offers exciting activities like bungee jumping and go-karting. Cool off on exciting water slides, float along the lazy river, or relax on the sandy beach. Capture fun-filled memories with family and friends as you indulge in non-stop entertainment. After an action-packed day, unwind as we drop you back at your hotel, ensuring a smooth and comfortable journey back. Sunway Lagoon guarantees an unforgettable experience.​

packages.package_name: Singapore: A City of Endless Adventures
packages.overview:
• Arrival in Singapore – Warm welcome at Changi Airport, seamless hotel transfer, and leisure time to explore or relax.
  • Cultural Immersion & Culinary Delights – Visit Merlion Park, Chinatown, Arab Street, enjoy hawker center flavors, and savor a Vietnamese dinner.
  • Futuristic Gardens & Spectacular Light Show – Explore ArtScience Museum, Gardens by the Bay, Avatar Experience, Flower Dome, and witness Garden Rhapsody.
  • Sentosa Island Adventure & Local Feast – Enjoy thrilling attractions on Sentosa Island and indulge in local flavors at Newton Food Market.
  • Departure – After a memorable trip, enjoy a smooth airport transfer for your journey back home.

Step into the climate-controlled wonders of the Flower Dome, showcasing global flora, and the mystical Cloud Forest, with its spectacular indoor waterfall. After an unforgettable experience, we’ll ensure a smooth drop-off back to your hotel.

After a delightful breakfast, a friendly Travelxploria representative will pick you up from your hotel. Embark on an unforgettable journey to the S.E.A. Aquarium on Sentosa, one of the world’s largest aquariums, housing over 100,000 marine animals across 45 habitats. Explore the mesmerizing marine life and, during the holiday season, enjoy the festive Splashtacular Christmas with thrilling waterslides and a relaxing lazy river experience. After a day of adventure, enjoy a comfortable drop-off back to your hotel.

Universal Studios Singapore is a world-class theme park located on Sentosa Island, offering a thrilling experience with seven uniquely themed zones, including Hollywood, Sci-Fi City, Jurassic Park, and Far Far Away. Visitors can enjoy exciting rides like Transformers: The Ride and Battlestar Galactica, immersive 4D shows, live entertainment, and meet iconic movie characters. Perfect for all ages, it’s a must-visit destination for adventure, fun, and family-friendly attractions. Enjoy the convenience of hotel pickup and drop-off, along with a knowledgeable Travelxploria guide to ensure a smooth and memorable experience throughout your visit.​

packages.overview:
• Arrival in Singapore – Enjoy a hassle-free transfer to your hotel and get ready for an exciting journey ahead.
  • Wildlife & Skyline Wonders – Explore the renowned Singapore Zoo and take in breathtaking views from Marina Bay Sands SkyPark.
  • Panoramic Views & Futuristic Gardens – Soar high on the Singapore Flyer and wander through the mesmerizing Gardens by the Bay.
  • Aerial Thrills & Spectacular Show – Glide across Sentosa on the Singapore Cable Car and witness the stunning Wings of Time show.
  • Departure – Enjoy a smooth transfer to the airport, bringing home unforgettable memories of Singapore.

Embark on a luxurious journey with Travelxploria's exclusive Singapore Flyer experience. Standing at 165 meters, the Singapore Flyer is one of the world’s largest observation wheels, offering stunning panoramic views of Singapore's skyline, along with glimpses of Malaysia and Indonesia. Your private capsule ride is complemented by a glass of champagne, elevating the experience as you take in the breathtaking urban architecture and cosmopolitan landscape. Enjoy a delectable gourmet breakfast served within your capsule, featuring a selection of fresh, delightful delicacies to start your day. Throughout your journey, a professional guide from Travelxploria will accompany you, providing fascinating insights into Singapore's iconic landmarks. With hotel pick-up and drop-off included, this seamless, indulgent experience is the perfect way to begin your day in Singapore.

Begin your day with a delicious breakfast, followed by a comfortable pick-up from your hotel with our Travelxploria guide. Explore the iconic Gardens by the Bay, a futuristic oasis blending nature and technology. Wander through the breathtaking Supertree Grove, marveling at the towering vertical gardens. Step into the climate-controlled wonders of the Flower Dome, showcasing global flora, and the mystical Cloud Forest, with its spectacular indoor waterfall. After an unforgettable experience, we’ll ensure a smooth drop-off back to your hotel.

On your visit to Sentosa Island, join Travelxploria for a thrilling ride on the iconic cable car that connects Faber Peak to the island. Enjoy a 30-minute journey offering 360-degree views of Singapore’s lush forests, impressive skyscrapers, and serene sandy beaches as you travel nearly 5 kilometers. Travelxploria’s representative will be with you throughout the experience, ensuring your comfort and providing fascinating insights along the way. The trip includes convenient pick-up from your hotel, so you can relax and enjoy the seamless start to your adventure. Once you’ve taken in the stunning sights from the cable car, you’ll be dropped off back at your hotel, completing the perfect, hassle-free experience. This journey offers the ideal mix of nature and cityscape, all guided by a Travelxploria expert.

After a delightful breakfast, a Travelxploria representative will pick you up from your hotel and guide you to the captivating Wings of Time show. Following your exploration of the ocean depths at S.E.A. Aquarium, get ready for a stunning seaside performance filled with lasers, pyrotechnics, water fountains, and 3D mapping. The show weaves an epic tale of a mythical bird and its companions, traveling through time across mesmerizing landscapes. After this unforgettable experience, you’ll be comfortably dropped off at your hotel to end your day seamlessly.

packages.overview:
• Arrival in Singapore – Hassle-free private transfer to your hotel, setting the tone for an exciting Singapore adventure.
  • Singapore Botanic Gardens - National Museum - Singapore Flyer – Discover nature, history, and breathtaking city views on a relaxed exploration.
  • River Wonders - Singapore Zoo - Night Safari – Experience incredible wildlife encounters from river-themed exhibits to nocturnal animal adventures.
  • Universal Studios Singapore – Dive into thrilling rides, live shows, and immersive movie magic at this world-class theme park.
  • Leisure Day – Enjoy a day at your own pace, from shopping to spa retreats or scenic cruises.
  • ArtScience Museum - Gardens by the Bay - Marina Bay Sands SkyPark – Explore futuristic art, lush greenery, and panoramic city skyline views.
  • Departure – A smooth airport transfer marks the end of an unforgettable Singapore journey.

National Museum of Singapore - Singapore Flyer","day_summary":"

Step into a world of tranquility at the Singapore Botanic Gardens, where lush greenery, vibrant orchids, and serene lakes create a perfect escape from the city's hustle. From the moment you step out of your hotel, our representative from Travelxploria ensures a seamless pick-up, making your journey effortless. With our experienced tour guide of Travelxploria, stroll through this UNESCO-listed paradise, discovering the rarest orchid species, tranquil swan-filled lakes, and centuries-old trees. Whether you're soaking in the beauty of the National Orchid Garden or enjoying the melodies of birds in the rainforest, every step feels magical. Our best on-ground support staff of Travelxploria ensures you have a comfortable and enriching experience, with hassle-free drop-off at your next destination. Let nature’s beauty and our exceptional service create a rejuvenating start to your Singapore adventure.

Start your day with a delightful breakfast before our Travelxploria guide greets you for a convenient pick-up from your hotel. Explore Singapore’s rich heritage at the iconic National Museum of Singapore, where interactive exhibits and cultural artifacts bring history to life. Immerse yourself in captivating stories, from Singapore’s early beginnings to its vibrant modern identity. Our expert guide will ensure you experience every highlight of this cultural gem. After a day of discovery, enjoy a comfortable drop-off back to your hotel.​

Embark on a luxurious journey with Travelxploria's exclusive Singapore Flyer experience. Standing at 165 meters, the Singapore Flyer is one of the world’s largest observation wheels, offering stunning panoramic views of Singapore's skyline, along with glimpses of Malaysia and Indonesia. Your private capsule ride is complemented by a glass of champagne, elevating the experience as you take in the breathtaking urban architecture and cosmopolitan landscape. Enjoy a delectable gourmet breakfast served within your capsule, featuring a selection of fresh, delightful delicacies to start your day. Throughout your journey, a professional guide from Travelxploria will accompany you, providing fascinating insights into Singapore's iconic landmarks. With hotel pick-up and drop-off included, this seamless, indulgent experience is the perfect way to begin your day in Singapore.

Begin your day with a delightful breakfast before embarking on an exciting journey to River Wonders Singapore with Travelxploria. Our friendly representative will pick you up from your hotel in a comfortable vehicle, ensuring a hassle-free experience. With our expert guide, explore Asia’s first and only river-themed wildlife park, home to fascinating creatures from iconic rivers like the Amazon, Nile, and Yangtze. Marvel at the adorable giant pandas at the Giant Panda Forest, enjoy a scenic boat ride, and discover vibrant aquatic life. After an enriching and immersive experience, sit back and relax as we drop you back at your hotel.​

Experience the enchanting Singapore Zoo with Travelxploria, your trusted travel agency for a seamless Singapore adventure. Begin your day with a delicious morning breakfast before our expert tour guide picks you up from your hotel. The Singapore Zoo, famous for its lush, tropical rainforest environment, is home to over 4,000 animals from around the globe. Explore diverse exhibits featuring lions, elephants, orangutans, kangaroos, and more, while enjoying interactive shows, tours, safaris, and animal feedings. With convenient hotel pickup and drop-off, this is the perfect day out for animal lovers and families.

Get ready for an unforgettable evening as our Travelxploria guide welcomes you with a convenient pick-up from your hotel. Experience the magic of the world’s first nocturnal zoo, the Night Safari, home to over 2,500 animals. Glide through the wilderness on a guided tram ride, passing through diverse habitats under the moonlit sky. Stroll along scenic walking trails for up-close encounters with creatures like tigers, flying squirrels, and more. After your thrilling night of exploration, we ensure a comfortable drop-off back to your hotel.​

Begin your day with a delicious breakfast, followed by a comfortable pick-up from your hotel with our Travelxploria guide. Explore the iconic Gardens by the Bay, a futuristic oasis blending nature and technology. Wander through the breathtaking Supertree Grove, marveling at the towering vertical gardens. Step into the climate-controlled wonders of the Flower Dome, showcasing global flora, and the mystical Cloud Forest, with its spectacular indoor waterfall. After an unforgettable experience, we’ll ensure a smooth drop-off back to your hotel.

Your Singapore adventure begins with a warm welcome from our Travelxploria representative, ensuring a seamless check-in and comfortable start to your journey. As the sun sets, our experienced Travelxploria tour guide leads you to the stunning Marina Bay, Singapore’s most iconic waterfront. Marvel at the legendary Merlion statue, capturing picture-perfect moments against the shimmering skyline. Stroll along the breathtaking Marina Bay Sands SkyPark, where panoramic city views leave you in awe. Our best on-ground support staff ensures a smooth and delightful experience as you soak in the lively atmosphere. As night falls, witness the Spectra Light & Water Show, a mesmerizing fusion of lights, water, and music dancing in perfect harmony. With seamless pick-up and drop-off, Travelxploria curates an unforgettable evening where every moment is designed for wonder and comfort. This is just the beginning of your incredible Singapore journey.

packages.overview:
• Arrival in Singapore – Settle in, explore vibrant streets, savor local cuisine, and relax before your adventure begins.
  • Iconic Landmarks & Duck Tour – Visit Merlion, National Museum, Botanic Gardens, and enjoy an exciting land-and-water Duck Tour.
  • Gardens & SkyPark Views – Explore ArtScience Museum, Gardens by the Bay, and enjoy stunning city views from Marina Bay Sands SkyPark.
  • Sentosa Thrills & Clarke Quay Nightlife – Enjoy world-class attractions on Sentosa Island and experience Singapore’s lively nightlife at Clarke Quay.
  • Universal Studios & Little India – Enjoy thrilling rides at Universal Studios and dive into the vibrant culture of Little India.
  • Shopping & Chinatown Exploration – Indulge in retail therapy at Orchard Road, take a city tour, and explore Chinatown’s rich heritage.
  • Departure from Singapore – Enjoy last-minute shopping or sightseeing before bidding farewell to this dynamic city.

National Museum - Botanic Gardens - Duck tours ","day_summary":"

A friendly Travelxploria representative will warmly greet you at your hotel lobby for a seamless pick-up. Begin your journey at the iconic Merlion Park, where Singapore’s legendary lion-fish symbol stands proudly, representing the city's vibrant heritage. Capture breathtaking photos with the stunning backdrop of Marina Bay Sands and the dazzling city skyline. Our expert guide will captivate you with stories of Singapore’s transformation from a humble fishing village to a world-class metropolis. Conclude your experience with a comfortable drop-off back to your hotel, making your Singapore tour truly memorable.

Start your day with a delightful breakfast before our Travelxploria guide greets you for a convenient pick-up from your hotel. Explore Singapore’s rich heritage at the iconic National Museum of Singapore, where interactive exhibits and cultural artifacts bring history to life. Immerse yourself in captivating stories, from Singapore’s early beginnings to its vibrant modern identity. Our expert guide will ensure you experience every highlight of this cultural gem. After a day of discovery, enjoy a comfortable drop-off back to your hotel.​

Join Travelxploria for an unforgettable Singapore Duck Tour, where land meets water in a thrilling amphibious ride! Start your day with a delicious breakfast before our comfortable vehicle arrives for your hotel pick-up. Our friendly Travelxploria guide will accompany you on this exciting journey aboard the iconic \"Duck\" vehicle, gliding past famous landmarks like Marina Bay Sands, the Merlion, and the Singapore Flyer. Enjoy fascinating stories and fun facts from our guide throughout the tour. After the adventure, relax as we provide a seamless drop-off back to your hotel.​

Experience the vibrant atmosphere of Clarke Quay, a riverside destination known for its lively nightlife. With Travelxploria, you’ll enjoy a curated tour of this bustling area, where a variety of dining options, lively bars, and entertainment await. From local delicacies to international cuisines, Clarke Quay offers something for every taste, all set against the backdrop of scenic river views. A Travelxploria representative will guide you through the best spots, ensuring you don’t miss any of the exciting highlights. Your night begins with convenient hotel pick-up and ends with a seamless drop-off, so you can relax and enjoy the experience without worry. Whether you're in the mood for a casual drink or a night of dancing, Clarke Quay is the perfect place to enjoy Singapore’s nightlife in style.

After a delightful breakfast, a friendly Travelxploria representative will pick you up from your hotel. Embark on an unforgettable journey to the S.E.A. Aquarium on Sentosa, one of the world’s largest aquariums, housing over 100,000 marine animals across 45 habitats. Explore the mesmerizing marine life and, during the holiday season, enjoy the festive Splashtacular Christmas with thrilling waterslides and a relaxing lazy river experience. After a day of adventure, enjoy a comfortable drop-off back to your hotel.

Universal Studios Singapore is a world-class theme park located on Sentosa Island, offering a thrilling experience with seven uniquely themed zones, including Hollywood, Sci-Fi City, Jurassic Park, and Far Far Away. Visitors can enjoy exciting rides like Transformers: The Ride and Battlestar Galactica, immersive 4D shows, live entertainment, and meet iconic movie characters. Perfect for all ages, it’s a must-visit destination for adventure, fun, and family-friendly attractions. In the afternoon, head to Little India, a lively and colorful neighborhood that reflects Singapore’s Indian heritage, offering bustling markets, traditional temples, and delicious Indian food. Enjoy the convenience of hotel pickup and drop-off, along with a knowledgeable Travelxploria guide to ensure a smooth and memorable experience throughout your visit.​

Begin your day with a guided city tour, led by a Travelxploria representative, to explore Singapore's iconic landmarks like the Singapore Flyer, the Civic District, and the Padang. After soaking in the sights, head to Chinatown, where you'll experience the vibrant cultural heart of Singapore, with opportunities to shop for souvenirs and visit the serene Buddha Tooth Relic Temple. Along the way, enjoy a delicious breakfast, carefully selected to energize you for the day ahead. packages.overview:
• Arrival in Singapore – Experience Singapore’s breathtaking skyline, lush landscapes, and vibrant cultural vibes. Relax or explore dynamic streets and indulge in authentic local cuisine.
  • Half-Day City Tour & Night Safari – Discover iconic Marina Bay Sands, enchanting Gardens by the Bay, and historic Chinatown. Witness fascinating nocturnal wildlife on an exhilarating guided tram ride at Night Safari.
  • Gardens by the Bay & Sentosa Island – Marvel at futuristic Supertrees, misty Cloud Forest, and colorful Flower Dome. Sentosa offers pristine beaches, thrilling adventures, and mesmerizing marine exhibits at S.E.A. Aquarium.
  • Universal Studios Singapore – Experience adrenaline-pumping rides, immersive movie-themed zones, and dazzling live performances, bringing Hollywood’s biggest blockbusters to life in an electrifying atmosphere.
  • Departure – Enjoy last-minute shopping, picturesque city strolls, or a relaxing café visit before departing with cherished memories of Singapore’s dynamic charm.

Kickstart your Singapore adventure with Travelxploria! Our friendly representative will pick you up from your hotel in a comfortable, air-conditioned vehicle for an exciting half-day city tour. Led by our expert guide, explore the city's top landmarks, including the iconic Merlion Park, the stunning Marina Bay Sands, and the vibrant streets of Little India and Chinatown. Capture breathtaking views at Gardens by the Bay and drive past the historic Padang and Parliament House. Immerse yourself in Singapore’s culture, history, and modern marvels. After an enriching tour, relax as we drop you back at your hotel, ensuring a seamless experience.

Get ready for an unforgettable evening as our Travelxploria guide welcomes you with a convenient pick-up from your hotel. Experience the magic of the world’s first nocturnal zoo, the Night Safari, home to over 2,500 animals. Glide through the wilderness on a guided tram ride, passing through diverse habitats under the moonlit sky. Stroll along scenic walking trails for up-close encounters with creatures like tigers, flying squirrels, and more. After your thrilling night of exploration, we ensure a comfortable drop-off back to your hotel.​

Step into a world of illusions with Travelxploria as we take you to Trickeye Singapore for an unforgettable adventure! Our representative will pick you up from your hotel in a comfortable, air-conditioned vehicle. Accompanied by our expert guide, explore this interactive 3D museum, where art comes to life through optical illusions. Pose with mind-bending exhibits, step into fantasy worlds, and create fun, Instagram-worthy moments. Laugh, explore, and let your imagination run wild! After an exciting session of creativity and fun, sit back and relax as we drop you off at your hotel, ensuring a hassle-free and memorable experience.​

On your visit to Sentosa Island, join Travelxploria for a thrilling ride on the iconic cable car that connects Faber Peak to the island. Enjoy a 30-minute journey offering 360-degree views of Singapore’s lush forests, impressive skyscrapers, and serene sandy beaches as you travel nearly 5 kilometers. Travelxploria’s representative will be with you throughout the experience, ensuring your comfort and providing fascinating insights along the way. The trip includes convenient pick-up from your hotel, so you can relax and enjoy the seamless start to your adventure. Once you’ve taken in the stunning sights from the cable car, you’ll be dropped off back at your hotel, completing the perfect, hassle-free experience. This journey offers the ideal mix of nature and cityscape, all guided by a Travelxploria expert.

Step into a world of illusions with Travelxploria as we take you to Trickeye Singapore for an unforgettable adventure! Our representative will pick you up from your hotel in a comfortable, air-conditioned vehicle. Accompanied by our expert guide, explore this interactive 3D museum, where art comes to life through optical illusions. Pose with mind-bending exhibits, step into fantasy worlds, and create fun, Instagram-worthy moments. Laugh, explore, and let your imagination run wild! After an exciting session of creativity and fun, sit back and relax as we drop you off at your hotel, ensuring a hassle-free and memorable experience.​

On your visit to Sentosa Island, join Travelxploria for a thrilling ride on the iconic cable car that connects Faber Peak to the island. Enjoy a 30-minute journey offering 360-degree views of Singapore’s lush forests, impressive skyscrapers, and serene sandy beaches as you travel nearly 5 kilometers. Travelxploria’s representative will be with you throughout the experience, ensuring your comfort and providing fascinating insights along the way. The trip includes convenient pick-up from your hotel, so you can relax and enjoy the seamless start to your adventure. Once you’ve taken in the stunning sights from the cable car, you’ll be dropped off back at your hotel, completing the perfect, hassle-free experience. This journey offers the ideal mix of nature and cityscape, all guided by a Travelxploria expert.

For those seeking relaxation, unwind in one of the city's tranquil parks or pamper yourself with a rejuvenating spa experience. With the best on-ground support staff of Travelxploria at your service, you can embrace this day at your own pace, knowing expert assistance is just a call away.

packages.overview:
• Night Safari/Bird Paradise – Experience a thrilling tram ride through nocturnal wildlife or explore a stunning aviary with exotic birds.
  • Universal Studios – Enjoy adrenaline-pumping rides, immersive attractions, and cinematic magic in thrilling themed zones like Jurassic Park and Transformers.
  • Sentosa Island Tour – Soar on a scenic cable car, meet lifelike wax figures, explore vibrant marine life, and witness a breathtaking night show.
  • Gardens by the Bay & Sky Park – Wander through futuristic floral domes and enjoy mesmerizing panoramic views from the stunning Marina Bay Sands SkyPark.
  • Departure – Relish last-minute shopping, savor delicious local cuisine, and bid farewell to Singapore with unforgettable experiences and cherished memories.

Start your day with a delightful breakfast before embarking on an exciting visit to Madame Tussauds Singapore with Travelxploria. Our friendly representative will pick you up from your hotel in a comfortable, air-conditioned vehicle. Accompanied by our expert guide, step into the world of fame and get up close with life-like wax figures of global celebrities, sports icons, and historical legends. Enjoy interactive experiences like the Spirit of Singapore boat ride and the Marvel Universe 4D adventure. Capture unforgettable moments with your favorite stars! After a fun-filled day, relax as we drop you back at your hotel for a seamless experience.​

After a delightful breakfast, a friendly Travelxploria representative will pick you up from your hotel. Embark on an unforgettable journey to the S.E.A. Aquarium on Sentosa, one of the world’s largest aquariums, housing over 100,000 marine animals across 45 habitats. Explore the mesmerizing marine life and, during the holiday season, enjoy the festive Splashtacular Christmas with thrilling waterslides and a relaxing lazy river experience. After a day of adventure, enjoy a comfortable drop-off back to your hotel.

After a delightful breakfast, a Travelxploria representative will pick you up from your hotel and guide you to the captivating Wings of Time show. Following your exploration of the ocean depths at S.E.A. Aquarium, get ready for a stunning seaside performance filled with lasers, pyrotechnics, water fountains, and 3D mapping. The show weaves an epic tale of a mythical bird and its companions, traveling through time across mesmerizing landscapes. After this unforgettable experience, you’ll be comfortably dropped off at your hotel to end your day seamlessly.

Begin your day with a delicious breakfast, followed by a comfortable pick-up from your hotel with our Travelxploria guide. Explore the iconic Gardens by the Bay, a futuristic oasis blending nature and technology. Wander through the breathtaking Supertree Grove, marveling at the towering vertical gardens. Step into the climate-controlled wonders of the Flower Dome, showcasing global flora, and the mystical Cloud Forest, with its spectacular indoor waterfall. After an unforgettable experience, we’ll ensure a smooth drop-off back to your hotel.

Your Singapore adventure begins with a warm welcome from our Travelxploria representative, ensuring a seamless check-in and comfortable start to your journey. As the sun sets, our experienced Travelxploria tour guide leads you to the stunning Marina Bay, Singapore’s most iconic waterfront. Marvel at the legendary Merlion statue, capturing picture-perfect moments against the shimmering skyline. Stroll along the breathtaking Marina Bay Sands SkyPark, where panoramic city views leave you in awe. Our best on-ground support staff ensures a smooth and delightful experience as you soak in the lively atmosphere. As night falls, witness the Spectra Light & Water Show, a mesmerizing fusion of lights, water, and music dancing in perfect harmony. With seamless pick-up and drop-off, Travelxploria curates an unforgettable evening where every moment is designed for wonder and comfort. This is just the beginning of your incredible Singapore journey.

packages.overview:
• Night Safari Tour – Embark on an exciting nocturnal wildlife adventure with a guided tram ride through Singapore’s renowned Night Safari.
  •  Singapore City Tour & Cruise – Explore iconic landmarks, cultural districts, and vibrant streets before boarding a luxurious cruise for a scenic evening.
  • Day 3: Leisure Day on Cruise – Relax with premium amenities, enjoy live entertainment, and soak in stunning ocean views aboard a world-class cruise.
  • Gardens by the Bay & SkyPark – Stroll through futuristic gardens, marvel at the Cloud Forest, and take in breathtaking skyline views from Marina Bay Sands SkyPark.
  • Universal Studios Singapore – Experience thrilling rides, immersive attractions, and Hollywood-themed adventures in Singapore’s top entertainment park.
  • Departure – Enjoy last-minute shopping and sightseeing before bidding farewell to Singapore with unforgettable memories.

Your Travelxploria guide will ensure you make the most of each stop, sharing insights into Singapore's rich history and traditions. The experience includes hotel pick-up and drop-off, providing a seamless, hassle-free journey throughout your tour.

packages.overview:
• Marina Bay Exploration: Iconic Merlion, breathtaking Marina Bay Sands SkyPark, dazzling Spectra Light & Water Show.
  • Cultural Heritage Tour: Vibrant Chinatown, aromatic Little India, majestic Sultan Mosque at Kampong Glam.
  • Gardens by the Bay & Sentosa: Futuristic Supertrees, lush Cloud Forest, thrilling Sentosa beaches, panoramic Sentosa Cable Car ride.
  • Universal Studios Singapore: Heart-pounding roller coasters, immersive themed zones, exhilarating movie-inspired attractions.
  • Hidden Gems Tour: Trendy Tiong Bahru, serene MacRitchie Reservoir, quirky Haw Par Villa with vibrant Chinese mythology.
  • Shopping & Night Safari: Luxury shopping on Orchard Road, lively Clarke Quay nightlife, magical Night Safari wildlife adventure.
  • Departure: Cherish unforgettable memories of Singapore’s wonders.

Begin your immersive cultural journey with a warm welcome from our Travelxploria representative, ensuring a seamless start to your day. Accompanied by our experienced Travelxploria tour guide, step into the vibrant streets of Chinatown, where heritage meets modern charm. Explore traditional shops, admire intricate architecture, and visit the sacred Buddha Tooth Relic Temple, a site of spiritual significance. Indulge in authentic local flavors before heading to Little India, where a burst of colors and exotic aromas transport you to a different world. Here, visit the historic Sri Veeramakaliamman Temple, a masterpiece of devotion and artistry. Finally, wander through Kampong Glam, the heart of Malay-Arab culture, where the majestic Sultan Mosque stands in grandeur. Shop for unique souvenirs in the lively alleys as our best on-ground support staff ensures a hassle-free experience with seamless pick-up and drop-off. With Travelxploria, every step is enriched with history, culture, and comfort.

Escape the usual tourist trails and uncover Singapore’s hidden gems with Travelxploria’s expert team ensuring a seamless, enriching experience. Our representative warmly greets you, and with our experienced Travelxploria tour guide, you begin your day in Tiong Bahru, a charming neighborhood filled with trendy cafés, independent bookstores, and a nostalgic local vibe. Indulge in authentic hawker delights at Tiong Bahru Market before heading to the tranquil MacRitchie Reservoir, where you can take a rejuvenating nature walk or experience the breathtaking TreeTop Walk, offering panoramic views of lush greenery. As the day winds down, explore the quirky and surreal Haw Par Villa, where vibrant sculptures bring Chinese mythology to life. Throughout the day, our best on-ground support staff ensures smooth transitions, with seamless pick-up and drop-off, making this offbeat adventure with Travelxploria truly effortless and unforgettable.

overview:
Best Singapore Tour Packages From Kolkata

​

Step into the dazzling city state of Singapore, where futuristic skylines, lush green spaces, and world class attractions come together effortlessly. Travelxploria brings you the Best Singapore Tour Packages From Kolkata, designed for families, honeymoon couples, and leisure travelers seeking a smooth, safe, and value driven international holiday. From iconic landmarks to immersive cultural neighborhoods, our Singapore tour packages from Kolkata are curated for comfort, convenience, and unforgettable experiences.

Why Choose Singapore Tour Packages From Kolkata

Singapore is one of the most convenient international destinations for travelers from Kolkata. With excellent flight connectivity via major hubs, reaching Singapore is quick and hassle free. Indian passport holders require a visa, and Travelxploria provides complete visa assistance with clear timelines, making the planning process simple and transparent. This ease of travel makes Singapore tour packages from Kolkata ideal even for first time international travelers.

Singapore is known for its clean cities, efficient transport, and diverse attractions. From luxury shopping and theme parks to cultural districts and waterfront views, a Singapore tour package from Kolkata offers a perfect mix of entertainment, sightseeing, and relaxation.

Ideal for Families, Couples, and Solo Travelers

Singapore caters to every travel style. Families love theme parks, interactive attractions, and safe public spaces. Couples enjoy romantic skyline views, rooftop dining, and scenic walks, while solo travelers appreciate the city’s safety and ease of navigation. Travelxploria customizes Singapore tour packages from Kolkata for families, couples, and individual travelers with flexible itineraries and reliable support.

Top Singapore Tour Packages From Kolkata

The most popular option is the 4 to 6 days Singapore tour package from Kolkata, covering the city’s top highlights without rushing. This itinerary typically includes Marina Bay Sands, Sentosa Island, and Gardens by the Bay. Travelers enjoy a perfect balance of city sightseeing, leisure time, and entertainment.

For couples, Singapore honeymoon packages from Kolkata focus on romantic experiences such as skyline dinners, sunset cruises, and luxury hotel stays. Budget friendly Singapore tour packages from Kolkata are ideal for value conscious travelers, offering comfortable hotels and guided sightseeing at competitive prices. Families and groups can choose customized Singapore itineraries with kid friendly attractions and relaxed schedules.

Must Visit Attractions Included in Singapore Tour Packages From Kolkata

Marina Bay offers breathtaking city views, the SkyPark observation deck, and vibrant nightlife. Sentosa Island is a favorite among families and adventure lovers, featuring beaches, resorts, and Universal Studios Singapore. Gardens by the Bay impresses visitors with its Supertree Grove and climate controlled domes. Cultural districts like Chinatown and Little India showcase Singapore’s heritage, while Orchard Road is perfect for shopping enthusiasts.

What Is Included in the Best Singapore Tour Packages From Kolkata

Best Time to Visit Singapore From Kolkata

February to April is ideal for pleasant weather and outdoor sightseeing. June to August is popular for family travel due to school holidays and seasonal events. Travelers looking for better deals can consider off peak months, which often offer attractive pricing on Singapore tour packages from Kolkata along with fewer crowds.
